requirements: Location : Lenovo US Fulfillment Center, Whitsett, NC Schedule : Full-time, 5 days onsite per week, First Shift Operations Availability : Occasional weekends and holidays as required About Lenovo Lenovo is a global technology leader known for innovation in PCs, servers, mobile devices, and smart solutions. You can be part of a global leader in technology and innovation, working on cutting-edge server platforms and manufacturing systems while collaborating with top talent across engineering, logistics, and operations and enjoying a dynamic work culture with opportunities for growth and impact. At our US Fulfillment Center in Whitsett, NC, we drive excellence in manufacturing and logistics to support our Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG). We are seeking a highly experienced and technically skilled Server Test Engineer to lead and optimize server production operations. This role is critical to ensuring high-quality output, process efficiency, and alignment with Lenovo’s global manufacturing standards. Key Responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive testing and validation of server hardware components. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure product quality and reliability. Develop and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts to Lenovo global standards. Identify, document, and track defects, and work with engineering teams to resolve issues. Participate in design and specification reviews. Analyze test results and provide detailed reports to stakeholders. Able to setup test infrastructure or hardware like Core servers, switches, rack cabling. Troubleshooting any test related issues using python, shell or bash command line. Basic Qualifications: BS in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field. Minimum of 3 years of experience in testing server hardware. Preferred Qualifications: Familiar with x86 Intel server architecture and/or GPU Nvidia Arm based technology. Familiarity with server components like CPU, memory, BIOS/UEFI, BMC, PSU, motherboard. Deep understanding of BIOS/UEFI and BMC validation, including Redfish, PLDM, IPMI. Proficiency with Tier 1 server OSes such as Windows Server, RHEL/SUSE, VMware. Proven ability to troubleshoot complex hardware issues. Hands on experience with Python and Bash scripting. Experience working in fast-paced manufacturing or production environments. Basic skills in IP, routing, MAC address handling, and port troubleshooting. Ability to configure PXE, DHCP, and other server services. Strong verbal and written English skills; effective team collaboration. Understanding of validation processes and test methodologies. Work Environment: Fast-paced, collaborative, and innovative environment. Emphasis on safety, sustainability, and continuous improvement. In essence, Test Engineers are the bridge between product design and the finished product, ensuring that manufacturing processes are efficient, cost-effective, and produce high-quality goods. The ideal candidate should demonstrate the ability to work independently in a high-pressure, results-oriented organization and have experience in self-management and motivating cross-functional teams to achieve business KPIs. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Additional

A posição requer perfil organizado, proativo e colaborativo, com capacidade de analisar situações, tratar exceções e atuar em conjunto com diferentes áreas da companhia, contribuindo para a eficiência da operação e para a melhoria contínua dos processos. Principais Responsabilidades Apoiar atividades relacionadas à elaboração de cotações, garantindo qualidade, precisão e cumprimento dos prazos estabelecidos. Atuar no suporte operacional aos processos de vendas, realizando análise, direcionamento e acompanhamento ponta a ponta das demandas da área, assegurando sua resolução dentro dos prazos e padrões estabelecidos pela companhia. Tratar exceções e apoiar a resolução de problemas relacionados ao ciclo de vendas, atuando em conjunto com as áreas responsáveis para identificar causas, viabilizar soluções e garantir a continuidade das operações. Trabalhar de forma integrada com Vendas, Parceiros, Clientes e demais áreas internas da companhia, facilitando a comunicação, destravando demandas e escalando situações críticas quando necessário. Manter controles operacionais e utilizar ferramentas corporativas para acompanhamento das atividades, organização da operação e monitoramento dos resultados da área. Identificar gargalos, riscos e oportunidades de melhoria, contribuindo para a eficiência da operação, padronização das atividades e evolução contínua dos processos. Compartilhar conhecimento e boas práticas com a equipe, contribuindo para a organização da área e o desenvolvimento contínuo do time. Formação e Experiência Ensino superior cursando ou concluído em Administração, Processos Gerenciais, Gestão Comercial, Engenharia ou áreas correlatas. Experiência prévia em atividades de Sales Support, Backoffice Comercial, Order Management, Customer Service ou áreas administrativas relacionadas ao suporte às vendas. Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to develop launch strategies for different distribution channels. Position Requirements: Minimum 5+ years product and/or business management experience. Visuals & computer accessory product experience is advantageous. A degree equivalent – preferably in Business. Strong business / customer understanding, and comfortable with financial management and P&Ls Experience with technology products, ideally from IT industry Good analytical skills with high level of accuracy in data analysis and reacts with appropriate urgency to situations. requirements: Location : Lenovo US Mfg. Smart Campus, Whitsett, NC Schedule : Full-time, 5 days onsite per week Availability : Occasional weekends and holidays as needed About Lenovo Lenovo is a global technology leader known for innovation in PCs, servers, mobile devices, and smart solutions. You can be part of a global leader in technology and innovation, working on cutting-edge server platforms and manufacturing systems while collaborating with top talent across engineering, logistics, and operations and enjoying a dynamic work culture with opportunities for growth and impact. At our US Smart Campus in Whitsett, NC, we drive excellence in manufacturing & Services to support our Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG). We are seeking a highly experienced and technically skilled Senior Server Test Engineer to lead and optimize server production operations. This role is critical to ensuring high-quality output, process efficiency, and alignment with Lenovo’s global manufacturing standards. Key Responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive testing and validation of server hardware components. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure product quality and reliability. Develop and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts to Lenovo global standards. Identify, document, and track defects, and work with engineering teams to resolve issues. Participate in design and specification reviews. Analyze test results and provide detailed reports to stakeholders. Required Qualifications: BS in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field. Minimum of 8 years of experience in testing server hardware. Preferred Qualifications: Familiar with x86 Intel server architecture and/or GPU Nvidia Arm based technology. Familiarity with server components like CPU, memory, BIOS/UEFI, BMC, PSU, motherboard. Deep understanding of BIOS/UEFI and BMC validation, including Redfish, PLDM, IPMI. Proficiency with Tier 1 server OSes such as Windows Server, RHEL/SUSE, VMware. Proven ability to troubleshoot complex hardware issues. Basic skills in IP, routing, MAC address handling, and port troubleshooting. Ability to configure PXE, DHCP, and other server services. Strong verbal and written English skills; effective team collaboration. Understanding of validation processes and test methodologies. Work Environment: Fast-paced, collaborative, and innovation-driven environment. Emphasis on safety, sustainability, and continuous improvement. In essence, Test Engineers are the bridge between product design and the finished product, ensuring that manufacturing processes are efficient, cost-effective, and produce high-quality goods. The ideal candidate should demonstrate the ability to work independently in a high-pressure, results-oriented organization and have experience in self-management and motivating cross-functional teams to achieve business KPIs. The ideal candidate must work without significant supervision and show leadership or management experience in past work experience. requirements: The Senior Sales Specialist - Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG) is responsible for driving revenue growth by acquiring new customers and expanding Lenovo's footprint within existing Enterprise and Public Sector accounts. Working closely with Account Managers, Client Managers, Channel Partners, and Technical Sales teams, the successful candidate will identify, qualify, and close opportunities across Lenovo's Infrastructure Solutions portfolio, including servers, storage, hybrid cloud, AI solutions, and services. The role is a senior individual-contributor role which requires strong customer engagement skills, solution-selling capabilities, and the ability to manage opportunities throughout the entire sales cycle. What you'll own: • Acquiring new Enterprise and Public Sector customers and develop business opportunities across assigned accounts, and within the assigned territory. • Building and maintaining a healthy pipeline of Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG) opportunities, managing them from opportunity identification through closure. • Identifying, qualifying, and pursuing opportunities across Lenovo's server, storage, hybrid cloud, AI, and services portfolio. • Achieving and exceeding assigned sales targets and business objectives. • Acting as a trusted advisor by understanding customer business challenges and aligning Lenovo solutions to their needs. • Supporting customer retention efforts through proactive account engagement and relationship management, ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction and responsiveness. • Coordinating with technical specialists, solution architects, services teams, finance, and channel partners to develop customer solutions. • Managing RFPs, tenders, commercial discussion, contract negotiations and procurement processes for enterprise and public sector customers. • Working closely with channel partners to generate incremental pipeline and accelerate business growth. • Maintaining accurate opportunity tracking, pipeline management, and forecasting within CRM systems. What You Bring: • Bachelor's degree in Business, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline. • Minimum 10–15 years of experience in enterprise technology sales, business development, or account management with Enterprise and/or Public Sector customers within the Gulf region. • Experience selling IT infrastructure solutions, data center technologies, cloud solutions, or enterprise services with a proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets. • Knowledge of server, storage, networking, hybrid cloud, AI, and infrastructure solutions. Experience with consumption-based or as-a-service offerings is an advantage. • Experience collaborating with channel partners and distributors. • Strong consultative and solution-selling skills, relationship building, stakeholder management capabilities, excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation abilities. Ready to advance your career and contribute to something bigger? Submit your application today and let's build the future together. The North American Services Supply Chain organization is seeking a strong candidate for the role of NA Order Fulfillment Specialist. This role within the team is to support in-warranty parts fulfillment for the PC sector of the business. The ideal candidate would be well organized and comfortable with managing multiple tasks including part order backlog, providing ETAs, clean order activities, and responding to emails in a timely manner to support our internal and external customers. Day to Day Responsibilities include: · Manage daily backlog for in-warranty PC part orders. o Track incoming supply and manage ETAs to customers. o Find alternate sources of supply for hard to source parts. o Identify Incorrect part orders and provide the correct part to order o Highlight help needed parts and work with the Worldwide team to pull in orders with extended ETAs. o Respond to personal and group email box inquiries from the call centers and other internal customer regarding questions about backorders · Manage clean order activities to ensure timely parts order fulfillment. o Work with the 3PL to rectify any orders that did not flow correctly. o Work with the inventory team for any needed adjustments on discrepant material. Basic Qualifications: · Bachelor’s degree in supply chain, business, or related field is preferred but not required. · Intermediate to advanced skills with Excel, PowerPoint and Outlook required. Preferred Qualifications: · 1-3 years experience in supply chain or service-related field preferred. · Must have strong organizational skills and be detail oriented. · Be able to effectively communicate and lead discussions with internal & external teams. · Power BI skills preferred. We follow a friendly hybrid model with three days a week in the office—great for collaboration and connection! We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Head of Service Channels Job Summary This position serves as the leader of Lenovo Japan's eService domain, including Support Site, FAQ, Chat, AI, and other self-service channels. The role is responsible for overseeing day-to-day operations, developing strategic direction, and driving continuous improvement initiatives to enhance customer experience (CX) and maximize self-service resolution rates. By leveraging Voice of Customer (VOC) insights and key performance metrics, the Head of Service Channels will identify improvement opportunities and establish a data-driven continuous improvement cycle that enhances service quality while optimizing operational costs. In addition, this role acts as a strategic partner to the Services Director and the Services Leadership Team. The position is expected to translate business strategies and transformation agendas into actionable execution plans, while leading cross-functional initiatives across Japan, Asia Pacific (AP), and Global teams to deliver measurable business outcomes. Monitor and manage key service metrics, including service quality, customer experience (CX), self-service resolution rates, and cost efficiency. Drive continuous improvements through VOC analysis, web analytics, and customer behavior insights. Accelerate service innovation and digital transformation through effective AI adoption and automation initiatives. Leadership Partnership & Strategic Execution Translate business strategies and organizational priorities into actionable plans and measurable outcomes. Support business planning, budgeting, Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs), and executive business reviews. Lead governance processes for strategic initiatives, including project tracking, risk management, and stakeholder alignment. Drive cross-regional projects involving Japan, AP, and Global teams. Provide data-driven insights and recommendations to support executive decision-making. Serve as a trusted advisor and strategic partner to the Services Director, contributing to overall organizational success and business performance. Demonstrated people management experience with a track record of leading and developing teams. Experience managing KPIs and leading operational improvement initiatives. Proven ability to lead and influence cross-functional projects and stakeholders. Experience translating business strategies and executive priorities into executable action plans. Strong communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills. Experience working with Asia Pacific and/or Global teams in a matrixed organization. Business-level English proficiency. Preferred Qualifications Experience managing eService, web support, FAQs, chat services, or self-service channels. Experience in contact center operations and/or customer support organizations. Proven track record of leading customer experience (CX) improvement initiatives. Experience with AI solutions, chatbots, knowledge management systems, or digital service platforms. Experience leading digital transformation and business process reengineering programs. Industry experience within hardware manufacturing, technology, IT services, or eCommerce environments. Key Competencies Strategic Thinking & Business Acumen Customer-Centric Mindset Data-Driven Decision Making Leadership & Team Development Change Management & Transformation Leadership Cross-Cultural Collaboration Stakeholder Influence & Executive Communication Operational Excellence & Continuous Improvement Innovation & AI Adoption Leadership Additional

requirements: Position Summary We are seeking an experienced and highly motivated Advisory UEFI Firmware Engineer to lead the design and development of next-generation server BIOS/UEFI firmware. This role requires deep technical expertise in UEFI architecture, strong system-level debugging capability, and the ability to drive cross-functional technical decisions. Key Responsibilities Technical Leadership Lead architecture, design, and implementation of complex UEFI firmware features. Own one or more critical firmware domains, including : (1) Boot Flow (2) Memory Initialization (3) PCIe (4) ACPI (5) SMBIOS (6) Security Define firmware architecture and coding guidelines Review technical design proposals and provide architectural direction. Firmware Development Develop and maintain EDK II based BIOS/UEFI firmware. Drive new platform bring-up for Intel and AMD server platforms. Implement new firmware features while maintaining high code quality. Optimize boot performance and firmware reliability. Support firmware security features including Secure Boot, TPM, Measured Boot, and capsule update. Debug & Problem Solving Lead complex root cause analysis involving: (1) CPU initialization (2) Memory training (3) PCIe enumeration (4) Boot failures (5) Performance issues (6) Hardware/Firmware interaction Utilize debugging tools such as: (1) Intel ITP/DCI (2) AMD HDT (3) UART logs Minimum Requirements: 8+ years of experience. requirements: Job Summary We are seeking a motivated AI Engineer to join our team in developing innovative AI-driven solutions for enterprise customers, with a focus on the Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) domain. This role is ideal for recent graduates or professionals with up to three years of experience who are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and enterprise software. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy AI solutions that enhance product development processes and improve operational efficiency. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and deploy AI and machine learning solutions for B2B customers, particularly within the Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) domain. Collaborate with product managers, software engineers, and business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate business needs into AI-driven solutions. Research, develop, and optimize AI algorithms and models to improve PLM processes, including: Bill of Materials (BOM) management Product change management Component search and sourcing Integrate AI capabilities into existing PLM platforms to improve productivity, reduce time-to-market, and enhance product quality. Analyze large datasets to identify trends, patterns, and insights that support product development and manufacturing decisions. Fine-tune, evaluate, and deploy Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) and other AI models for enterprise use cases. Stay current with emerging AI technologies, machine learning techniques, and PLM industry trends to continuously improve solutions. Contribute to the design of scalable, maintainable, and production-ready AI systems. Provide technical guidance and share knowledge with junior team members when appropriate. Participate in Agile/Scrum development activities, including sprint planning, code reviews, testing, and continuous improvement. Qualifications Education Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, or a related discipline. Master's degree is preferred. Fresh graduates and campus hires are encouraged to apply. Experience 0–3 years of experience in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, or related fields. Experience developing AI solutions for enterprise or B2B applications is an advantage. Knowledge or experience in the Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) domain is a strong advantage. Technical Skills Strong understanding of Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning concepts. Proficiency in one or more programming languages such as: Python Java C++ Experience with AI/ML frameworks such as: TensorFlow PyTorch Keras Familiarity with Transformer architectures and pre-trained language models, including: GPT BERT Other Transformer-based models Experience with model fine-tuning, inference, prompt engineering, or deployment is preferred. Knowledge of big data technologies such as Hadoop and Spark. Experience working with SQL and NoSQL databases. Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform is an advantage. Familiarity with Agile/Scrum software development methodologies. Required Competencies Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences. Self-motivated with a willingness to learn new technologies. Ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a collaborative team. Passion for innovation and continuous improvement. Language Requirement Proficient in written and spoken English. This job description outlines the primary responsibilities and qualifications for the position. Duties and requirements may be modified from time to time to meet business needs and organizational objectives. Additional

requirements: We are looking for a Strategy & Operations Assistant to support CPC & SMB business operations through AI-enabled data processing, Power BI reporting, business analysis support, and daily department coordination. This role is designed for someone who is highly organized, data-sensitive, and confident in applying AI tools and Power BI to improve reporting efficiency, structure business information, visualize key insights, and support operational decision-making. Job Qualifications --Bachelor’s degree or above in Data Analytics, Information Systems, Business, or related fields. --Hands-on experience using AI tools in real work scenarios. --Hands-on experience with Power BI / PBI, Excel, PowerPoint, and other reporting or data visualization tools. --Good understanding of business intelligence, data analysis, reporting, and digital productivity solutions. --Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and ability to structure information clearly. --Strong communication and coordination skills, with the ability to work across teams and functions. --Good English and Chinese communication skills, both written and verbal. --Proactive, responsible, well-organized, and able to manage multiple tasks with clear priorities. We are actively seeking an experienced commercial contracts professional with strong negotiation skills, commercial acumen, and a practical, solutions-oriented mindset. The role of Commercial Contract Manager within Lenovo's Solutions and Services Group (SSG) represents an excellent opportunity to shape complex, high-value deals and contribute to the growth and development of this influential legal function. As a leader in its field, Lenovo offers exposure to large-scale, complex international transactions with top-tier brands and some of the most strategically significant engagements in its portfolio. As a key commercial partner to SSG across Europe and META, you will support complex services transactions, including DaaS, TruScale, and other managed service offerings. Working at the intersection of commercial strategy, legal frameworks, and delivery reality, you will help ensure deals are shaped to win, structured to perform, and governed to succeed. In doing so, you will play a central role in delivering faster, cleaner deals, enabling Legal to focus on high-impact legal risk while driving stronger contracts, better delivery outcomes, effective risk-for-value decisions, and robust in-life contract management practices. Responsibilities: Pre-Signature — Shaping and Closing Complex Deals Define the contracting route and design the commercial structure aligned to win strategy and delivery reality, supporting both direct and indirect contracting models. Lead contractual deal governance in partnership with Legal Counsel, taking contracts from draft through to signature and developing negotiation strategies that maximise value and manage concessions effectively. Set and challenge key commercial and economic levers, including credits, incentives, volume commitments, indexation, true-up/down mechanisms, benchmarking, and termination methodologies, while identifying and mitigating risks. Own the commercial elements of contracts, including Service Descriptions, SOWs, SLAs, KPIs, credits, pricing structures, governance, benchmarking, insurance, and termination/exit provisions. Partner with Legal on non-standard contractual matters, including liability, indemnities, IP, data protection, information security, governing law, and disputes, ensuring alignment between legal positions and commercial outcomes. Growth, Enablement and Innovation Establish subcontracting processes and a CCM support model, ensuring obligations and terms flow correctly between all parties involved in each transaction. Develop and enhance commercial frameworks, tools, and best-practice materials, including SLA/KPI guidance, commercial models, volume commitment options, flexibility frameworks, and legal/commercial playbooks. Deliver commercial awareness training across the business and contribute to AI-assisted commercial processes and performance metrics that support consistent, high-quality deal execution and demonstrate the value delivered by the CCM function. Requirements: 8+ years of experience in commercial contract management or a related commercial/legal discipline, with a track record in complex, multi-country IT or telecommunications services contracts. Strong drafting and negotiation skills across SOWs, SLAs/KPIs, pricing structures, service descriptions, and enterprise technology or managed services agreements, with demonstrated negotiation leadership on high-value transactions. Experience partnering with legal, sales, delivery, and finance teams in a deal-driven environment, with strong commercial acumen, sound judgement, and the ability to balance legal, commercial, and technical contract requirements. Relevant tertiary qualification. Confident and professional in customer-facing negotiations, with the ability to build trusted relationships with clients, GSI partners, and internal stakeholders at all levels. Experience with technology financing models (IT asset leasing, device lifecycle management, equipment financing) and/or subscription-based “as-a-service” commercial models such as DaaS, IaaS, or TruScale-type offerings. Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, evolving environment within changing commercial frameworks and governance programmes, with strong communication skills, professional ethics, and experience delivering commercial training or enablement to non-commercial audiences. Willingness to travel to client sites as required. What We Can Offer: Holiday purchase scheme and support for a positive work-life balance. Private medical cover, life insurance, and income protection. Attractive pension scheme. Learning and development opportunities. Employee discounts on Lenovo and Motorola products, plus a wide range of lifestyle discounts. Cycle to Work scheme and MyGymDiscounts membership
responsibilities: Pre-Signature — Shaping and Closing Complex Deals Define the contracting route and design the commercial structure aligned to win strategy and delivery reality, supporting both direct and indirect contracting models. Lead contractual deal governance in partnership with Legal Counsel, taking contracts from draft through to signature and developing negotiation strategies that maximise value and manage concessions effectively. Set and challenge key commercial and economic levers, including credits, incentives, volume commitments, indexation, true-up/down mechanisms, benchmarking, and termination methodologies, while identifying and mitigating risks. Own the commercial elements of contracts, including Service Descriptions, SOWs, SLAs, KPIs, credits, pricing structures, governance, benchmarking, insurance, and termination/exit provisions. Partner with Legal on non-standard contractual matters, including liability, indemnities, IP, data protection, information security, governing law, and disputes, ensuring alignment between legal positions and commercial outcomes. Growth, Enablement and Innovation Establish subcontracting processes and a CCM support model, ensuring obligations and terms flow correctly between all parties involved in each transaction. Develop and enhance commercial frameworks, tools, and best-practice materials, including SLA/KPI guidance, commercial models, volume commitment options, flexibility frameworks, and legal/commercial playbooks. Deliver commercial awareness training across the business and contribute to AI-assisted commercial processes and performance metrics that support consistent, high-quality deal execution and demonstrate the value delivered by the CCM function.

requirements: We are looking for a Pre-sales Technical Consultant for our infrastructure / datacenter solutions for Enterprise type customers. In this role you will lead technical discovery and solution design, advise the customer, and partner with sellers to win solution-led deals across compute, storage, software and services. What are the key responsibilities? Lead technical discovery; capture and reframe technical criteria to architect the right solution. Architect SDI / DCI / Storage solutions (single-site, standard HCI / hybrid-cloud use cases). Provide pre-sales and POC support to help customers implement Lenovo ISG products and solutions. Identify, engage and manage SME interactions within the account book to drive technical strategy. Communicate technical concepts credibly in customer and partner engagements. Capture product feedback through the lifecycle (DAU, GA, EOL) to improve Lenovo products. Mentor junior Sales Engineers and contribute to account strategy and solution design. What you bring Bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional experience. 5+ years of successful technology sales / pre-sales, with a track record against multi-million-dollar quota. Demonstrated ability to architect basic SDI (VX / HX / MX) solutions and size DCI / SDI / Storage. Proven experience with senior management and IT decision-makers. Ability to deploy and manage DCI / SDI systems via Lenovo systems-management tools. Willingness to travel to customer sites up to 50%. Fluent French English required. What Lenovo offers A dynamic, international environment within a global technology leader. Strong career development across Europe and globally. Access to continuous learning platforms (e.g. Lenovo Grow). Flexible working models (country dependent). Competitive compensation and performance-based incentives. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: Lenovo Computer AG is seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Procurement Specialist to provide temporary support to the procurement team during a business transition project. This role offers an opportunity to work in a dynamic supply chain environment, collaborating with suppliers and cross-functional stakeholders to ensure smooth execution of purchasing, production planning, and operational processes. What will you do: Manage FG Purchase Orders to ODMs Issue and manage Finished Goods (FG) purchase orders to ODM suppliers, ensuring order accuracy, timely release, and on-time delivery. Drive LCAG Production Plan Execution Monitor and follow up LCAG production plan execution, ensuring alignment between planned and actual output while proactively addressing risks and deviations. Develop and Align ODM Production Plans Develop and coordinate ODM production plans to ensure alignment between demand forecasts, capacity, and material readiness to support delivery targets. Maintain PSD Data Integrity Maintain and update Production/Shipment Data (PSD) with high accuracy and timeliness, ensuring data transparency and cross-functional alignment. Manage CN/DN and Financial Reconciliation Handle Credit Note (CN) and Debit Note (DN) processes, ensuring timely reconciliation, accurate adjustments, and compliance with financial policies What we are looking for: Bachelor’s degree or above in Supply Chain, Logistics, or related fields. 3+ years of experience in supply chain planning, production planning, or fulfillment. Solid understanding of end-to-end supply chain and production processes. Experience working with ODM suppliers and cross-functional teams. Strong communication and problem-solving skills. Fluent in English; proficiency in Excel or ERP systems is preferred. What Lenovo can offer you: Employee Share Purchase Plan Employee Assistance Program, e.g., for health, legal & financial consultancy Pension Plan Meal Allowance / Lunch Vouchers Internal E-learning Development Platform Available for Employees Specialized Development Trainings (based on nomination process) Employees Groups (LGBT+, WILL, etc.) Opportunity to Join/Create Employees Groups (inclusivity, well-being, sports, volunteering, charity, etc.) Job Rad (Bike Leasing) Lenovo’s inclusive culture is shaped by strong voices and real stories—discover our Women@Lenovo here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZwcbxS0KS-w and see why our workplace is proudly recognized with the Kununu Top Company award for the fifth year in a row: https://www.kununu.com/de/lenovo-deutschland1 At Lenovo we are proud to be an equal opportunity company. This vacancy certainly applies for people with disabilities, too. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. As a One Lenovo Services Sales Executive you will be responsible for driving services and solutions in our Enterprise and Public Sector segments. What you will do: Act as a domain specialist and trusted advisor, partnering with Account Teams to develop customer relationships and drive transformation opportunities. Orchestrate Lenovo’s end-to-end portfolio across Devices, Infrastructure, Services and AI solutions, bringing together cross-functional teams to deliver customer-centric business outcomes. Build and coordinate high-performing teams to design and position complex solutions that maximize value for customers and Lenovo. Identify, qualify and develop new business opportunities, creating sales strategies that drive growth in existing and new accounts. Establish executive-level relationships and translate customer business challenges into scalable and financially viable solutions. Manage customer expectations and acts as the bridge between customers, solutioning teams and delivery organizations. Serve as the key interface between Sales, Business Partners, stakeholders and Lenovo leadership to accelerate opportunity progression. Drive opportunities through Lenovo’s governance process, ensuring alignment with growth, profitability and strategic priorities. What you bring: 5+ years of experience of selling professional and managed services into the corporate segment, preferably around device-as-a-service, digital workplace services and data center solutions and services Effective territory & account management: planning, opportunity qualification and creation, stakeholder and executive communication, needs analysis, value engineering, services/partner engagement, opportunity management, pipeline management Ability to present and to pitch at the right level to a wide range of key stakeholders from CXO to Technical to Finance Capable of being seen as a thought leader and trusted advisor for digital and AI-driven transformation, guiding customers from strategy to execution Has a proven pedigree of leading large IT projects whether those are sales, consulting, pre and post-sales as well as transformational IT services The position requires the ability to articulate and present the business value of Lenovo's solutions and have a firm understanding of industry strategies and products Experience leading large and complex deals Understanding of AI and Generative AI concepts and their application to Data Center and Services environments We look forward to connecting with you over this opportunity! We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: Key Responsibilities: Provide day-to-day helpdesk and operational support for partners, including guidance on partner onboarding and Bid tools (e.g., LPH, LBPe), processes, and system navigation. Support deal registration activities, including approval, rejection, re-routing, and exception handling. Assist with order-related inquiries, such as order status checks, stuck orders, and coordination with relevant teams. Act as a bridge between partners and IT support, managing communication, gathering required information, and providing status updates. Deliver partner guidance on onboarding, contracts, invoices, licenses, RMA/DOA processes, and program-related queries. Support ticket handling via: Email Live Chat Teams calls Helpdesk Ticket Management Tool Support ticket management, including raising and tracking various types of tickets. Perform triage support, directing inquiries to appropriate internal teams and ensuring resolution follow-up. Maintain and update knowledge documentation, contribute to process improvements, and deliver ad-hoc training or guidance. Support system testing and remain up to date with tool enhancements to better assist partners. Such as partner onboarding to order processes. Experience supporting partners or B2B customers preferred Ability to handle high-volume requests in a fast-paced environment Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills Ability to work across teams and manage multiple requests efficiently Customer-focused with a proactive mindset Experience working in a cross-region or global environment Ability to support North America business hours Additional

requirements: Lenovo Infrastructure Solution Group (ISG) Cloud Service Provider (CSP) team is seeking a Senior Technical Project Manager (TPM) to lead server product development for Tier-1 hyperscale customers. In this role, you will manage cross-functional development teams to deliver best-in-class server systems—spanning customer scope management, requirement clarification, design implementation, and validation. Additionally, you will collaborate with key functional teams (including Architecture, Procurement, Manufacturing, and Service) to ensure validated products transition smoothly into mass production and are successfully delivered to customers. Key Responsibilities End-to-End Program Ownership: Own and manage product development programs for Tier-1 customers. Drive comprehensive project planning (schedule and budget), proactively mitigate risks, manage stakeholder expectations, and ensure the project team achieves on-time delivery for all milestones. Cross-Functional Leadership: Lead multidisciplinary engineering and operational teams (including EE, ME, Thermal, BIOS, BMC, Validation, Manufacturing, and Supply Chain) to rapidly resolve customer-reported design, quality, compatibility, firmware, and hardware issues. Engineering Change Management: Oversee project change requests, including Engineering Change Orders (ECOs), Bill of Materials (BOM) updates, firmware/hardware revisions, and regression validation plans. Global Collaboration: Partner with global teams across the US, Taiwan, and international manufacturing sites to align priorities and ensure seamless execution. KPI & Risk Reporting: Track, analyze, and report key program metrics (KPIs), risks, and mitigation strategies to both internal executives and external customers. Customer Relationship Management: Work closely with customer program managers, system leads, and engineering teams to provide timely status updates and maintain strict alignment on priorities and deliverables. Sustaining & Quality Support: Coordinate and monitor Field Replaceable Unit (FRU) returns, Failure Analysis (FA), Root Cause Analysis (RCA), and the implementation of corrective actions. Continuous Improvement: Capture and share lessons learned and best practices to elevate team capabilities and optimize future project execution. Basic Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related technical field. 10+ years of experience in program or project management within a server or computer hardware design team, with prior ODM experience highly preferred. Deep knowledge of server architecture (including CPU, memory, storage, thermal, BMC, and BIOS) and a comprehensive understanding of the end-to-end product lifecycle—from requirement solicitation through mass production and sustaining engineering. Preferred Qualifications: Proven ability to manage complex, global cross-functional teams and drive high-pressure issue resolution under demanding customer timelines. Self-motivated leader with exceptional problem-solving abilities, strong communication skills, and a proactive mindset. Strong experience in collaborating across diverse global teams. Prior experience supporting Tier-1 hyperscale customers is highly preferred. PMP or an equivalent project management certification is a distinct advantage. requirements: About the Position This position will serve as the primary “hunter” position that will drive the design of our relationship with Cloud Service Providers. In this position you will drive large-scale infrastructure adoption of Lenovo’s GPU-rich clusters and high-density compute nodes. Travel: Lead in-person Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs), factory tours, and represent Lenovo at key industry conferences. Demonstrated success defining long-term vision and tactical execution on accounts. Demonstrated success leading full lifecycle sales from opportunity identification to “power-on.” Experience closing on enterprise scale or global RFPs. Experience driving data-driven decisions in partnership with Finance, Supply Chain, Inside Sales, Technical Sales, Services, Engineering and functional teams. Strong sense of priority and communication skills to ensure clear alignment. Strong documentation skillset: MS Project, PowerPoint, Office. Strong verbal and written communication skills. Cultural Competency working across Chinese, American, Desi, European, and South American cultural contexts, ensuring messages are communicated with clarity and tact. The base salary range for this position is 200-220k. This position has a remote working schedule and has up to 90% travel. Lenovo’s various

requirements: Lenovo is seeking a motivated early career individual to join the Software Procurement team within Global Procurement, a key function of Lenovo's Global Supply Chain organization. The team supports Lenovo's PC and Smart Devices business by managing strategic software supplier relationships, commercial agreements, and operational execution for a portfolio exceeding $3B in annual spend across more than 80 global suppliers, including Microsoft, Google, Adobe, Dolby, McAfee, and Absolute. This role offers an opportunity to develop expertise in software procurement, supplier management, contract negotiations, AI technologies, and global business operations while collaborating with stakeholders across the U.S., China, and other regions worldwide. Key Responsibilities Support the management of software suppliers and day-to-day procurement activities. Assist with the review, negotiation, and execution of software agreements and commercial terms. Coordinate with cross-functional teams, including Legal, Finance, Engineering, Product Management, and Business Units. Monitor supplier performance, identify issues, and support continuous improvement initiatives. Analyze supplier proposals, pricing, licensing models, and market trends to support sourcing decisions. Support business teams in evaluating software, cloud, and AI solutions to maintain competitive offerings. Ensure compliance with Lenovo procurement policies, processes, and contractual obligations. Contribute to supplier reviews, reporting, and process improvement initiatives. Required Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Business, Supply Chain Management, Computer Science, Engineering, Finance, or a related field. Strong analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills. Strong attention to detail and organizational skills. Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel and PowerPoint. Preferred Qualifications Internship or project experience in procurement, supply chain, sourcing, contract management, or business operations. Knowledge of data analytics and reporting tools such as Power BI. Demonstrated leadership through academic, extracurricular, or internship experiences. Interest in software, cloud technologies, AI, and the technology industry. This position is not eligible for visa sponsorship now or in the future. Candidates must have authorization to work in the United States without the need for sponsorship, including CPT or OPT. * Ability to work 3:2 Hybrid Schedule in Morrisville, NC (3 days in office and 2 flex). We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: 【2027年4月入社新卒採用募集要項】 レノボでは『開発エンジニア』、『テクニカルプロジェクトマネージャー』 などの職種で新卒採用活動を実施しております。 これから当社を目指すみなさんには、様々な背景をもつスタッフとコミュニケーションをとり、自らの意見を発信していただきたいと考えています。そのために必要なのはまず、異文化を受け入れ世界に影響ある仕事をしたいというグローバルな熱意、そして論理的思考で自らの意見を的確に伝えるコミュニケーション能力。さらにエンジニアとして、みずから課題を見つけ解決方法を導き出すリーダーシップ。なにより、物づくりや最新のIT動向にアンテナを張り情報を集め続ける積極性の高さです。 以上の素養を持ち、私たちとともに、世界を舞台にイノベーションを手掛ける仕事ができるはず。グローバル企業として、若手であっても裁量権をもって仕事を進められる開発環境、そして海外に開かれたビジネスの機会を用意してみなさんをお待ちしています。 ◎具体的には以下の職種で募集しています。 (1)【正社員】開発エンジニア（勤務地：神奈川県横浜市）= 所属企業：Lenovo レノボは、世界中で愛用されているノートPC：ThinkPadで有名な、PCシェア世界No.1のグローバル企業、NECPCは、日本でPCシェアNo.1を維持し続けている、日本のPCのパイオニアとも呼ばれる存在です。R&D開発部門では主に以下の役割で新卒社員の募集を行っています。 ・機構設計・開発（メカ） PC ・ITデバイスの筐体（ボディー）の設計開発、部品の設計・評価業務など ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/so/ https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/cf/ ・電子回路設計開発（エレキ） PC ・ITデバイスの基板（マザーボード）を含んだシステム全体の設計開発など ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/yt/ ・BiOS／Firmware開発（BiOS） ハードウェアの初期化/抽象化、ユーザー認証、OS起動などシステムの基盤ソフトウエアの開発又はCPUとは独立してThinkPadを制御しているマイコン開発 ・ソフトウェア開発（ソフト） PC ・ITデバイスの(AI機能含めた)ユーティリティソフトウェア等の開発 ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/kn/ ・部品設計開発（サブシステム） 液晶パネルやワイヤレスカード、バッテリーなどの部品の設計・品質管理など ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/at/ ・テクニカル・プロジェクト・マネージャー (TPM) 国内外のチームと協力し、スケジュール、コスト、品質のプロジェクト・マネジメントを行う 。 ※新卒入社例： https://www.necpc-lenovo-recruit.jp/engineer-voice/mi/ ※想定年収は大卒 478万円、院卒以上 518万円 程度を想定しています。 ◎選考を受ける事をご希望の方には、以下への参加及び提出物への対応をお願いしています。 ・会社説明会への参加 ・エントリーシートのご提出 ・追加資料 (PPTプレゼン・データ) ・適性検査受検 １．会社説明会への参加をまだしていない方は、応募資料となるご経歴が分かる情報を含め、こちらのページからエントリーをして下されば、 この後ご参加頂ける説明会の日時を複数添えて返信致しますので、まずはこの後のガイダンスに従い、説明会にご参加ください。 2. 既に会社説明会を受けた方で、応募職種が決まっている方は、当社指定フォーマットのエントリーシート及び追加資料をご提出頂くことからご対応頂く事となります。 こちらのページから応募資料をまだ登録していない方は、ご経歴が分かる情報を含めエントリーをお願いします。 同様にこの後の選考について説明させて頂きます。 それでは皆さまからのエントリー、お待ち申し上げております。 Additional

【2027年4月入社新卒採用募集要項】 Lenovo group FCNT合同会社( https://www.fcnt.com/company/about/ ) では『FCNT携帯電話ハードウェア開発担当』、『FCNT携帯電話ソフトウェア開発担当』 などの職種で新卒採用活動を実施しております。 FCNTのミッションとは、 『「やさしいテクノロジー」で、すべての人に未来を。』、『世の中が必要とする先端技術を、誰もが使えるカタチに。一人ひとりによりそい、誰ひとり取り残すことなく、多様で豊かな「つながり」をつくる。』です。 これを実現させる為、特にらくらフォンシリーズ( https://www.fcnt.com/product/rakuraku/ )を日本国内市場にお届けし、シニア層の方々に喜ばれる機能（見やすく使いやすい画面、健康管理を意識した自律神経が測れる機能、見知らぬ発信者への抑止など）を盛り込むなど、独自性を発揮した携帯電話を開発しています。また昨今では世界最高水準の耐久性を実現させたarrows Alpha( https://www.fcnt.com/product/arrows/m08-sim-free/ )をリリースしたことも話題となっています。 日本市場で磨き続けてきた、人や環境への想いを起点とした技術開発を引き継ぐ意欲がある方。またその価値の追求を止むことなく続け、世界へ発信して行ける、頼もしい仲間を探しています。FCNT新卒社員として一社に働いてくださることに興味がある方は、まず募集職種をご確認ください。 ◎具体的には以下の職種で募集しています。（※所属企業はLenovoでは無く、FCNTとなりますので、ご注意ください） (1)【正社員】ハード開発職（勤務地：神奈川県大和市中央林間）= 所属企業：FCNT レノボグループのFCNT合同会社において、プロダクト製品(携帯端末、周辺機器)開発のプロジェクトマネージメント、並びに、ハードウェア全般の開発・評価を担務しているR&D部門になります。 (2)【正社員】ソフトウェア開発職（勤務地：神奈川県大和市中央林間）= 所属企業：FCNT レノボグループのFCNT合同会社の製品/クラウドサービスに向けて、クラウドサービス/アプリケーション/Androidのカスタマイズ/デバイス制御や通信機能など多岐にわたります。 【雇用主】FCNT合同会社 【勤務地】FCNT本社（神奈川県大和市、中央林間駅） 【雇用形態】 正社員 (試用期間: 6ヵ月） 【募集人数】 若干名 【給与条件】 (大卒) 年収 4,633,200円 / （院卒以上） 5,010,720 円 【残業手当】 別途支給対象 【勤務時間】9:15-18:00（休憩時間60分） 【想定年収】(B8）※総合評価により提示させていただきます 【休日】土曜、日曜、祝日、年末年始、設立記念日、特別休暇、代休 等 【福利厚生】厚生年金、健康保険、雇用保険、労災保険、確定拠出年金、財形貯蓄 等 ◎選考を受ける事をご希望の方には、以下への参加及び提出物への対応をお願いしています。 ・会社説明会への参加 ・エントリーシートのご提出 ・適性検査受検 １．会社説明会への参加をまだしていない方は、応募資料となるご経歴が分かる情報を含め、こちらのページからエントリーをして下されば、後日ご参加頂ける説明会の日時を複数添えて返信致しますので、まずはこの後のガイダンスに従い、会社説明会にご参加ください。 ２．既に会社説明会を受けた方で、応募職種が決まっている方は、当社指定フォーマットのエントリーシートをご提出頂くことからご対応頂く事となります。 こちらのページから応募資料をまだ登録していない方は、ご経歴が分かる情報を含めエントリーをお願いします。 同様にこの後の選考について説明させて頂きます。 それでは皆さまからのエントリー、お待ち申し上げております。 Additional

requirements: Job Responsibilities: 1. Data infrastructure management: Work with the team to complete the foundational setup of distributed data storage and computing architecture, and participate in the platform operation management. 2. Participate in the development of data processing procedures: Assist in the requirement analysis, script development and testing of ETL/ELT processes, and participate in basic tasks such as data collection, cleaning, and transformation to ensure data quality. 3. AI model development: Participate in the training, optimization and deployment support of AI models, learn and practice the basic applications of frameworks such as PyTorch/TensorFlow, and assist in setting up simple model validation scenarios. 4. Data Governance: Assist in organizing data classification and establishing annotation standards, participate in basic tasks such as metadata management and data quality monitoring, and contribute to the accumulation of enterprise data assets. 5. Technical Learning and Practice: Actively participate in team technical sharing and training sessions, quickly master the core technologies related to Data & AI, convert the knowledge learned at school into project practical skills, and produce basic technical documents. 6. Collaborate across teams: Assist the product and algorithm teams in completing the requirements alignment and data support tasks, participate in the analysis of business scenarios, and contribute to data-driven business optimization. Job Requirements 1. Education and Major: Bachelor's degree or above, majoring in Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics, etc. 2. Basic Skills: Proficient in Python programming language, familiar with SQL data query and processing; those with basic knowledge of big data technologies (Hadoop, Spark) or AI frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow) are preferred. 3. Learning ability: Possess strong self-study skills and problem-solving abilities. Enjoy adopting new technologies and have good logical thinking and data analysis skills. 4. Project/Practice Experience: Candidates with course designs related to data processing and model training, research projects, academic competitions (such as mathematical modeling, big data competitions, AI innovation competitions), or internship experiences during their studies will be given priority. 5. Comprehensive Qualifications: Possess excellent communication and expression skills, a strong sense of teamwork and responsibility. requirements: We are seeking an AI Software Engineer to join our U.S.-based Sales IT Systems team. You will build backend services using Java/Spring and develop AI/ML components using Python and a machine learning framework such as PyTorch (or equivalent). You will help deliver AI-enabled features end-to-end—from problem understanding and solution design to implementation, model training/experimentation, and production integration. We value engineers who can work with ownership, collaborate well, and bring product thinking—people who can propose ideas, challenge assumptions constructively, and drive practical outcomes. This position will follow a hybrid work model in our Morrisville, NC office. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain backend services for Sales IT systems using Java and Spring Framework/Spring Boot. Build and support microservices (REST APIs, integration patterns, service reliability/observability basics). Develop AI/ML-related code in Python, including data preparation, training experimentation, and evaluation. Participate in AI projects with hands-on model training experience (e.g., feature engineering or embeddings, training runs, metrics, iteration, reproducibility). Integrate trained models into applications (online inference APIs or batch jobs), ensuring performance, stability, and maintainability. Work with relational databases and SQL; collaborate on data modeling and query/performance considerations. Use modern engineering practices and tools (Git, code reviews, testing, CI/CD) to deliver production-quality software. Partner with stakeholders to clarify business needs, translate them into technical solutions, and iterate based on feedback. Demonstrate ownership: break down ambiguous problems, propose options, and drive tasks to completion with minimal supervision. Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field (or equivalent experience). 2+ years of experience working with programming skills (Java and Python). Preferred Qualifications Graduates from top-tier universities or those holding a Master’s degree are preferred. Familiarity with Spring Framework (Spring Boot preferred). Understanding of microservices architecture and API development. Hands-on experience with at least one ML/DL framework, e.g. PyTorch, TensorFlow, or scikit-learn. Real project experience in AI training (internship, academic, or industry), including training and evaluation of models. Working knowledge of relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL/MySQL/Oracle) and SQL. Proficiency with common development tools and workflows (Git, debugging, build tools, testing). Strong self-motivation and collaboration skills. Experience deploying AI models to production (batch/streaming/online inference) and basic MLOps concepts. Familiarity with containers and cloud (Docker/Kubernetes; AWS/Azure/GCP). Experience with distributed systems, messaging, or caching (Kafka/RabbitMQ/Redis, etc.). Ability to speak Chinese (Mandarin) is a plus. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: About the Role We are seeking a highly motivated campus graduate to join our Digital Transformation team of the Infrastructure Solution Group (ISG) unit. In this role, you will owns and be responsible for designing and optimizing the suite of tools and technologies that enable our ISG business The goal of this role is to drive performance transparency and transformation cadence, ensuring our plans and business case are aligned with ISG initiatives. Intern+ experience managing Operation Digital Transformation initiatives for high-tech product organizations on a global scale . Preferred Qualifications Advanced degree in Math, Engineering, Computer Science , Business or AI relevant fields preferred. Experienced in defining, managing and delivering large scale complex process management and business change programs. Proactive orchestrator with an eye for detail, and leadership ability. Au sein de l’équipe Channel & SMB, Lenovo France recrute un(e) Apprenti(e) Open Channel. Vous participerez au développement et au déploiement de la stratégie partenaires Open Channel de Lenovo sur le segment SMB (small & medium business). Vous serez activement impliqué(e) dans le recrutement de nouveaux partenaires, leur onboarding chez Lenovo, ainsi que dans l’animation des partenaires afin de développer le chiffre d’affaires récurrent et la fréquence d’achat. Ce poste offre une expérience terrain dans les ventes indirectes, le recrutement de partenaires et le développement commercial, dans un environnement international et dynamique. Principales responsabilités Recrutement et intégration des partenaires Identifier et contacter de manière proactive des partenaires IT non encore partenaires Lenovo (revendeurs, intégrateurs, MSP). Présenter la proposition de valeur du partenariat Lenovo et convaincre les partenaires de rejoindre l’écosystème Open Channel. Accompagner les partenaires tout au long du processus d’inscription et d’intégration Lenovo (création de compte, outils, adhésion aux programmes). Agir comme point de contact clé afin d’assurer une intégration fluide et efficace des partenaires. Activer et animer des partenaires Animer un portefeuille de partenaires Open Channel afin de développer une activité récurrente avec Lenovo. Aider les partenaires à tirer pleinement parti des offres Lenovo, promotions, incentives et programmes partenaires. Accompagner la réalisation des premières ventes et la montée en puissance progressive des partenaires sur l’ensemble des portefeuilles Lenovo (PC, solutions, services). Développement commercial et suivi de la performance Suivre l’activité des partenaires (commandes, fréquence d’achat, évolution du chiffre d’affaires). Identifier les partenaires à fort potentiel et définir des actions d’activation ciblées. Contribuer au suivi des indicateurs clés de performance (taux d’activation, récurrence, fréquence d’achat, sell-in / sell-out). Participer à la préparation des revues business partenaires et internes. Support Channel et coordination interne Soutenir les Account Managers Channel & Distribution dans la gestion quotidienne des partenaires Open Channel. Relayer auprès des partenaires les informations clés (offres, campagnes, nouveautés produits). Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes Ventes, Marketing, Opérations et Supply afin d’optimiser l’expérience partenaires. Garantir la mise à jour fiable des outils CRM et de reporting Channel. Profil recherché Étudiant(e) en Commerce, Vente ou Management (niveau licence ou master). Fort intérêt pour les ventes B2B, les modèles économiques indirects et les écosystèmes partenaires. À l’aise avec les chiffres, Excel et les outils de reporting. Proactif(ve), organisé(e) et rigoureux(se). Excellentes capacités de communication et fort esprit d’équipe. Français courant et anglais professionnel requis. Ce que nous offrons Une alternance opérationnelle, au cœur de l’organisation Channel de Lenovo. Une exposition directe au recrutement et à l’activation des partenaires. Un environnement international, dynamique et orienté apprentissage.Un développement solide de compétences en ventes indirectes, gestion de partenaires et analyse business. Pourquoi rejoindre Lenovo France ? Vous développerez une compréhension approfondie de la construction de la performance commerciale via les écosystèmes partenaires, acquerrez des compétences commerciales à forte valeur ajoutée et contribuerez à un marché en pleine transformation, porté par le digital et l’IA. Alternance de 12 à 24 mois, basée à Rueil-Malmaison. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Lenovo Computer AG is seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Procurement Specialist to provide temporary support to the procurement team during a business transition project. This role offers an opportunity to work in a dynamic supply chain environment, collaborating with suppliers and cross-functional stakeholders to ensure smooth execution of purchasing, production planning, and operational processes. What will you do: Manage FG Purchase Orders to ODMs Issue and manage Finished Goods (FG) purchase orders to ODM suppliers, ensuring order accuracy, timely release, and on-time delivery. Drive LCAG Production Plan Execution Monitor and follow up LCAG production plan execution, ensuring alignment between planned and actual output while proactively addressing risks and deviations. Develop and Align ODM Production Plans Develop and coordinate ODM production plans to ensure alignment between demand forecasts, capacity, and material readiness to support delivery targets. Maintain PSD Data Integrity Maintain and update Production/Shipment Data (PSD) with high accuracy and timeliness, ensuring data transparency and cross-functional alignment. Manage CN/DN and Financial Reconciliation Handle Credit Note (CN) and Debit Note (DN) processes, ensuring timely reconciliation, accurate adjustments, and compliance with financial policies What we are looking for: Bachelor’s degree or above in Supply Chain, Logistics, or related fields. 3+ years of experience in supply chain planning, production planning, or fulfillment. Solid understanding of end-to-end supply chain and production processes. Experience working with ODM suppliers and cross-functional teams. Strong communication and problem-solving skills. Fluent in English; proficiency in Excel or ERP systems is preferred. What Lenovo can offer you: Employee Share Purchase Plan Employee Assistance Program, e.g., for health, legal & financial consultancy Pension Plan Meal Allowance / Lunch Vouchers Internal E-learning Development Platform Available for Employees Specialized Development Trainings (based on nomination process) Employees Groups (LGBT+, WILL, etc.) Opportunity to Join/Create Employees Groups (inclusivity, well-being, sports, volunteering, charity, etc.) Job Rad (Bike Leasing) Lenovo’s inclusive culture is shaped by strong voices and real stories—discover our Women@Lenovo here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZwcbxS0KS-w and see why our workplace is proudly recognized with the Kununu Top Company award for the fifth year in a row: https://www.kununu.com/de/lenovo-deutschland1 At Lenovo we are proud to be an equal opportunity company. This vacancy certainly applies for people with disabilities, too. Additional

We are looking for a Pre-sales Technical Consultant for our infrastructure / datacenter solutions for Enterprise type customers. In this role you will lead technical discovery and solution design, advise the customer, and partner with sellers to win solution-led deals across compute, storage, software and services. What are the key responsibilities? Lead technical discovery; capture and reframe technical criteria to architect the right solution. Architect SDI / DCI / Storage solutions (single-site, standard HCI / hybrid-cloud use cases). Provide pre-sales and POC support to help customers implement Lenovo ISG products and solutions. Identify, engage and manage SME interactions within the account book to drive technical strategy. Communicate technical concepts credibly in customer and partner engagements. Capture product feedback through the lifecycle (DAU, GA, EOL) to improve Lenovo products. Mentor junior Sales Engineers and contribute to account strategy and solution design. What you bring Bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional experience. 5+ years of successful technology sales / pre-sales, with a track record against multi-million-dollar quota. Demonstrated ability to architect basic SDI (VX / HX / MX) solutions and size DCI / SDI / Storage. Proven experience with senior management and IT decision-makers. Ability to deploy and manage DCI / SDI systems via Lenovo systems-management tools. Willingness to travel to customer sites up to 50%. Fluent French English required. What Lenovo offers A dynamic, international environment within a global technology leader. Strong career development across Europe and globally. Access to continuous learning platforms (e.g. Lenovo Grow). Flexible working models (country dependent). Competitive compensation and performance-based incentives. Additional

Head of Service Channels ■ Job Summary （職務概要） 本ポジションは、 Lenovo Japan の eService 領域（ Support Site 、 FAQ 、 Chat 、 AI などのセルフサービスチャネル）の責任者として、日々の運営管理から戦略立案、継続的改善までをリードし、顧客体験（ CX ）の向上と自己解決率の最大化を推進します。 顧客の声（ VOC ）や各種 KPI を基に課題を特定し、データドリブンな改善サイクルを確立することで、サービス品質向上とコスト最適化を実現します。 また、本ポジションは Service 本部 Director およびリーダーシップチームの戦略パートナーとして、事業方針や変革アジェンダを具体的な実行計画へ落とし込み、組織横断での推進をリードします。日本・ AP ・グローバルをつなぐハブとなり、関係部門との連携を通じて重要施策の実行と成果創出を推進していただきます。 ■ Key Responsibilities （主な職務内容） ① eService 運営統括 ・ eService 全体（ Support Site / FAQ / Chat / AI ）の運営責任 ・サービス品質、 CX 、自己解決率、コスト KPI 管理 ・ VOC および Web 分析データに基づく改善推進 ・ AI 活用によるサービス高度化 ・ベンダーおよび関係部門マネジメント ② 組織横断推進・業務変革 ・業務プロセス標準化および最適化 ・組織横断施策の推進 ・ AP/Global との連携および Best Practice 導入 ・中長期変革アジェンダ推進 ③ Leadership Partnership & Strategic Execution ・事業方針をアクションプランへ落とし込み実行推進 ・事業計画、予算、 QBR 、 Business Review 支援 ・重要プロジェクトの進捗・リスク管理 ・ Japan/AP/Global 横断プロジェクト推進 ・データ分析による意思決定支援 ・ Services Director の信頼できるパートナーとして組織成果最大化に貢献 ■ Qualifications （応募要件） 【必須要件】 ・サービス運営、事業オペレーション、事業企画等の領域におけるマネジメント経験 ・ピープルマネジメント経験 ・ KPI 管理および業務改善をリードした経験 ・部門横断でプロジェクトを推進した経験 ・経営方針や事業戦略を実行計画へ落とし込み推進した経験 ・優れたコミュニケーション能力およびステークホルダーマネジメント能力 ・ AP またはグローバルチームとの協業経験 ・ビジネスレベルの英語力 【歓迎要件】 ・ eService 、 Web サポート、 FAQ 、 Chat 、セルフサービスチャネルの運営経験 ・コンタクトセンターまたはカスタマーサポート領域での経験 ・ CX 改善プロジェクトの経験 ・ AI 、チャットボット、ナレッジマネジメント領域の経験 ・デジタルトランスフォーメーションまたは業務改革プロジェクトの経験 ・ハードウェアメーカー、 IT 、テクノロジー、 eCommerce 業界での経験 Additional

requirements: Key Responsibilities Customer Demand Research & Analysis : Conduct in-depth communication with end customers, sort out and refine business and technical requirements for robotic applications, clarify project scope, technical indicators and delivery standards, and form standardized requirement documents. Customized Solution Design : Collaborate with internal R&D teams and external partners to design, demonstrate, customize and optimize overall solution architectures for diverse industrial scenarios, based on the company’s core product capabilities of inspection quadruped robots, industrial operation robots and logistics robots. POC Verification & Pre-sales Support : Independently plan, design and verify customer POC. Provide professional technical consultation, solution presentation and technical argumentation to support sales teams in resolving pre-sales technical issues and facilitating contract signing. Project Delivery & Implementation Support : Provide continuous technical support during project implementation, track the full delivery process, verify solution implementation effects, and ensure all deliverables meet SOW and customer acceptance standards for smooth project final acceptance. Solution Iteration & Technical Optimization : Continuously optimize the architecture, functions and performance of robotic application solutions to ensure their advancement, stability and reliability. Summarize industry experience to drive standardized and productized iteration of solutions. Job Requirements Educational Background : Bachelor’s degree or above in engineering majors including Automation, Mechanical/Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Mechatronics and other related fields. Professional Experience : Minimum 8 years of working experience in robot solution pre-sales or solution architecture roles. Proven experience in customized design and full-cycle delivery of robot industry solutions, familiar with technical logic, application scenarios and delivery standards of industrial, inspection and logistics robots. Comprehensive Competence : Strong technical comprehension and solution design capabilities, able to match customer demands with product technologies efficiently. Excellent bilingual communication and cross-departmental collaboration skills to coordinate resources and drive project progress. Language Proficiency : Fluent in both spoken and written Chinese and English, capable of smooth technical communication and document compilation in bilingual environments. Personal Quality : Rigorous logical thinking, strong sense of responsibility and project control ability, capable of independently solving technical and collaborative problems in solution design and project implementation. Preferred Competencies Familiar with the working principle, core parameters and application limitations of robot dog inspection and AGV/AMR logistics robots; Familiar with the business processes and inspection standards of electric power, mining, petrochemical and other industries; Experience in leading POC verification, solution bidding and full-process project delivery of robotic industry projects. company: 众安在线财产保险股份有限公司
company_name: 众安在线财产保险股份有限公司
job_name: 一、对于招聘的不同认知
job_title: 一、对于招聘的不同认知
requirements: 人力专业知识 识人能力 主人翁意识 2.猎头+行业分析员+企业面试官 招聘人员的理想状态是：猎头+行业分析员+企业面试官。 猎头：迅速+高效+敏锐 企业面试官：业务+人力把控 行业分析员：专业+战略+分析 3.招聘人员易犯错误 不过，我们很多的小伙伴他可能只是刚刚处于入门，可能是刚刚去从招聘的角度、企业面试官的角度进行一些判断，所以其实招聘人员也容易有一些这样那样的问题。 业务不熟悉，理解有偏差 这个可能更多体现在一些刚刚进入招聘领域的同仁，有可能会有一些理解上的偏差。 对企业整体了解和把握不足 对公司整体性了解不足，以至于对一些招聘的具体的情况也把握不足。 横向沟通、整合资源能力弱 那么，最有效的招聘是什么？其实是资源的整合。最深远的招聘是什么？其实是雇主品牌的建设。而最现实的招聘就是招聘人员综合能力的提升。 二、找什么样的人？ 1.冰山素质模型 知识：指在特定领域了解的专业知识。 技能：指运用知识完成具体工作的能力。 价值观、角色定位：指一个人对职业的预期和对事物的看法。 自我认知：指对自己的认识（性格，特长，优势，劣势等） 个性、品质：指一个人持续而稳定的行为特性。 内驱力、动机：指人内在的自然而持续的想法和偏好。 相信作为HR对“冰山素质模型”并不陌生，特别是冰山以上的部分：知识、技能，这些和基本行为都是表象的，非常容易通过一些方式加以判定。真正迷惑我们的或者不好去判定的是潜在的部分： 价值观、角色认定、自我认知、个性等。 2.人才素质维度 另外，我们还需要结合各自公司的使命、愿景、价值观，以及用人理念来构建属于自己的独特人才素质维度。 首先我们来看素质维度的底层逻辑是什么？ 最底层是知识技能部分，包含管理支持、行业支持等方面，知识技能之上就是专业维度，指的是专业素质、专业能力和业务资源，那么再往上递升的话就是管理维度，包括管理素质管理能力，到顶端部分，其实也就是特质、价值观的部分。那么，为什么把价值观放在顶端？其实这个是真正能够判定人才的最核心部分之一。 其他部分其实是可以加以弥补的，比如说专业知识、专业性等方面，但价值属性、价值观是不容易去改变的。所以这是一个很重要的基础，判定这个人能不能跟公司的价值观吻合。 3.周密的招聘计划 招聘需求： 首先要明确用人部门是不是能把招聘的岗位名称、需要招聘的数量描述清楚，清楚岗位本身，比如薪酬福利等方面。 岗位说明书： 岗位的基本描述以及任职资格。 招聘预算： 清楚一个人才的成本区间，需要采用怎样的宣传策略、招聘渠道等。 甄选方案： 采用笔试、测评、面试等方法进行甄选。 4. 开展岗位分析，撰写岗位说明书 开展岗位分析这个部分对人员本身的画像来说非常重要，撰写岗位申请书则包括了岗位描述和任职资格两部分：设置目的、工作职责、组织图表、业绩标准、工作权限、职责履行程序；知识、技能、能力、个性特征、培训需求。 三、如何招人？ 1.神奇的人才地图 通过绘制“人才地图” 可以快速了解人才市场、锁定关键人才， 帮助我们摸清楚这些问题：我所招聘的人员，我所需求的人员，他们到底在哪里？他们目前的动态到底是什么样的？我们真正能够吸引他的会在哪些方面？薪资该如何对标？等等。 行业调研 结合招聘岗位，开展行业调研，建立起对行业的准确认知。当我们对行业本身有大的框架性思路和认知后，就会发现有些方面会越来越精准。 竞品企业分析 选取行业TOP10企业，展开对标分析。对于竞品公司，尤其是要选取行业里边的前10到前20名企业，展开一些对标分析，是具有一定的参考价值的。 基本情况：公司简介、发展历程、股权结构、资产规模、业务分析、主要产品、财务分析 管理团队：董事会、总经理、副总经理等姓名、年龄、背景资料 组织架构：组织架构现状、组织架构的变化调整分析 人力资源：员工数、人员构成、人才饱和度、人才来源 发展前景：发展方向、战略前景、战略目标 人才地图的构建 人才地图里面会分为几个它的应有必要项，比如说年龄、性别、学历，现在的职位，他的直接的上下属是什么？他目前的薪资状况是什么？有没有一些其他的股权等等。通过这一系列的要素，我们会有一个综合得分，建议大家从企业和行业两个维度构建整个人才地图。 当然有的公司可能现在还没有办法从整个行业构建，就可以先从企业的角度构建人才地图，将来再从整个大行业的角度去构建，实现人才地图的1.0到2.0版本的升级。 2.甄选及流程设置 制定方案 常见的人才甄选方法，相信大家都不陌生，从结构化面试、行为面试法、角色扮演、无领导小组讨论，到测评、背调、笔试等等。在自己公司特定的场景之下，我们也可以选择其中的一种或几种相结合。 同时，除了常见的人才甄选方法以外，我们要制定有效的甄选方案，从4个维度入手： 甄选方法的选择，甄选团队如何去搭建，流程如何去制定以及最终的录用决策方式， 这几个维度来制定有效的甄选方案。 精准邀约 每一个面试官都会经历邀约的过程，现在邀约的方式也更加多元化，不管是哪一种方法，通过邀约的过程其实是跟候选人做了一对一的沟通，对这个候选人是否适合我们有了第一步的判定。 简历细节核实： 通过邀约、沟通的过程，可以对简历细节进行一步一步核实。当如果有吐字不清或观点不清的情况，建议通过邀约就直接拒绝进入下一个环节，因为可能他们不适合企业的需求。 人岗匹配度初判： 如果通过跟他的沟通，发现这个人的经验和你要求的差距特别大，只是简历写得还不错，也建议不要进入下一个环节。 推荐公司，邀请面试： 我们在邀约过程之中介绍本公司的一些情况以及一些优劣势的方面，更多的可能是关于公司的优势方面，但是如果有下面的这种情形的，我们建议不要进入下一环节：比如说在邀约过程中，候选人朋友态度非常冷漠，不屑于沟通，如果来到公司以后，他很难能够跟公司团队融合。 薪酬调查：当我们发现薪资期望严重超标的情况，我们也需要谨慎。 精准邀约以后，我们可以进入下一个环节，就是候选人进入到我们的公司，这样我们就会有一个面谈的机会，分工如下：人力资源部门面试、业务部门面试。 人力资源部门面试：重点考察价值观、组织文化匹配度、素质能力、意愿动机等。 业务部门面试：重点考察专业能力、资源能力、团队匹配度等。 上图列举的这6类，可能很多公司一直在用，包含 结构化面试、行为面试法、迷彩面试法、压力面试法、放松面试法和情景面试法。 说到精准面谈，不得不提到样去让流程更加无缝对接，怎样形成一个完整闭环。 我们公司有一个基本的要求，他进入公司以后，候选人在第一时间能够看到我们的面试官。我们要求面试官在门口或者是某一个位置去迎接候选人朋友，通过候选人的言行举止、外在形象等等其实也可以得出一个初步的判定。迎接完以后，我们会让候选人朋友做一些自我介绍等。 简单的环节后面有大的逻辑，因为每个人的表达逻辑条理和性格都是不太一样的。通过这个过程之中，你可以对他有一个比较初步的判断，当然这只是第一环节，在面试的过程之中，还会通过知识、技能，他的专业能力素质以及管理能力素质去做进一步的判定。 另外，关于价值观，很多人会问价值观要通过什么样的考量方法来实现？其实可以用我们熟悉的一种方法，通过有一些问题去判定，如果是他会怎样去决策？基本上几个问题就能看出他的价值观是什么样的。 3.决策录用 通过前面一系列环节进入了最关键的部分：录用决策。 关于录用决策流程和事项，有的公司有面试评价表、审批表，只要按内部各自公司的流程进行即可。当然给到候选人朋友，可能就需要有一个口头通知/电话沟通，但是也建议能够正式发一份offer，内容建议把入职时间、岗位、职级、薪酬福利等描述清晰，形成一个相对比较完整的闭环。 录用决策有上图 “十大禁忌” ，当然可能也不仅限于此。 过多的推销公司，忽略双向交流。 很多面试官很少给对方去交流的机会，没有询问对方是不是有一些需要了解的部分，形成一种单向沟通的模式。 无意义的提问。 很多候选人在听公司面试官的问题的时候，对方也有一个判定，很多问题跟录用本身其实没有什么瓜葛，没有什么关联度，但往往还一而再再而三地进行提问，无意中会让候选人产生一种反感。 不合理的面试时间安排。 举个例子，面试时间安排在晚上9点以后，这个会让对方首先有一个不明确的推测，这是有悖于正常的面试安排时间的，因此我们建议安排在正常工作时间范围之内去进行。 考察方法过于单一，仅是提问。 往往大家只采用了一种提问式，比如说，有一部分人员属于面霸类型，经历了很多面试。所以你想要问的问题，他都已经非常清晰，可能比面试官还要清晰。因此有一些特殊岗位，我们建议方法不要太过单一，不能只是提问，比如说还可以有一些情景问答等方式。 四、如何跟踪评估？ 以上是关于录用决策本身，但我们把人员录用了以后，就形成闭环了吗？不是这样的，如果真正形成闭环，是要做持续性的跟踪与评估的。这个部分我们会分为入职人员和未入职人员两个部分去跟踪和评估。 入职人员如何去跟踪？ 当我们发放了offer以后，他进入公司、部门以后，我们与用人部门做持续性沟通，去了解这个人是不是能够真正进入这个角色、是否适应。 很多公司都会采用比如指导员或师傅的模式，让入职人员他能够快速进入角色，适应公司的文化，快速实现个人的价值。那么同时的话也还有一点，它可以采用一种定期或不定期的这种沟通的方式。我们经常采用的是三天、一周、一个月、两个月、三个月这几个时间段去做定期沟通，这样持续性的跟踪来了解我们所录用的人员是不是真正能存活，是不是面临一些问题，让我们可以及时有效地协助解决。 未入职人员如何跟踪？ 其实我们可以看一下，本来一些比较有意向的人员、我们非常满意的人员为什么没有进入公司？比如挖掘分析未入职原因，可能里边有一些共性的东西；还要提醒我们注意这些候选人更重视什么、更期待什么，在我们的公司里面是不是有弥补的措施？ 同时，大家也可以和他们建立一个朋友的关系，定期去沟通和联系，建立了一个信任的基础。另外，我个人建议这些人员都能够进入公司的简历库，做好有效长效的跟踪，让我们的招聘工作更趋于完整化。 跟踪评估的目的 跟踪评估的目的其实在于： 收集意见，必要时提供帮助与支持；关注录用人选工作状态及动向，维护公司用人安全；根据反馈的信息，改进提升招聘工作。 通过一系列的跟踪过程，让整个招聘工作形成一个完整的闭环状态。 experience: 选择具有相关背景和经验的候选人，以便他们能够理解和应对组织的挑战和需求。
responsibilities: 和要求：职位设计应该明确工作内容和要求，包括所需的技能、知识和经验等，以便为职位招聘和培养合适的人才。 职位层级和关系：职位设计应该考虑职位的层级和关系，确保各个职位之间的协调和合作。 二、职责分配 职责分配是管理职位系统的核心，它涉及到将职位的目标和职责分配给具体的人员。在职责分配过程中，需要考虑以下几个方面： 人员匹配：根据职位的要求和人员的能力、经验和兴趣等，将合适的人员分配到相应的职位上，以确保职责的有效履行。 职责明确：职责分配应该明确具体的工作任务和目标，以便管理者和员工都清楚自己的职责和期望。 协作和沟通：职责分配应该考虑到不同职位之间的协作和沟通，以确保工作的顺利进行和团队的高效运作。 三、管理者选拔 管理者的选拔是管理职位系统中的重要环节，他们对组织的运作和发展起着关键作用。在管理者选拔过程中，需要考虑以下几个方面： 背景和经验：选择具有相关背景和经验的候选人，以便他们能够理解和应对组织的挑战和需求。 领导能力：评估候选人的领导能力，包括沟通能力、决策能力、团队合作能力等，以确保他们能够有效地管理和激励团队。 适应性和学习能力：选择具有适应性和学习能力的候选人，以便他们能够适应不断变化的组织环境和需求。 四、职位评估 职位评估是管理职位系统的重要环节，它涉及到对职位的绩效和效果进行评估和反馈。在职位评估过程中，需要考虑以下几个方面： 目标和指标：设定明确的目标和指标，以便衡量职位的绩效和效果。 反馈和改进：及时提供反馈和建议，帮助管理者和员工改进工作方法和效果。 职位调整和发展：根据评估结果，进行必要的职位调整和发展，以适应组织的变化和需求。 管理职位系统是组织中的一个重要组成部分，它涉及到职位的设计、职责的分配和管理者的选拔。一个良好的管理职位系统可以帮助组织实现目标，提高工作效率，促进员工发展和组织的可持续发展。通过职位设计、职责分配、管理者选拔和职位评估等方面的工作，组织可以构建一个高效的管理职位系统，为组织的成功和发展奠定基础。 相关文章 构建高效管理职位系统：优化组织运作的关键 在现代企业中，管理职位系统扮演… 社招系统常用的功能有哪些呢？ 如今市场上想要招聘到一个合适的… 求职招聘管理软件：连接求职者与招聘者，优化招聘体验 在现代化的求职与招聘环境中，求… 标签： 管理职位系统 继续阅读 以前的文章 构建高效管理职位系统：优化组织运作的关键 在下一篇文章 管理职位系统的重要性和实施方法 你可能也喜欢 优质Offer管理：吸引人才塑造企业形象 2023年11月28日 2026年企业绩效系统选型指南：现状对比与性价比高的TOP品牌推荐 2026年4月9日 员工绩效考核软件：激发潜力，提高生产力 2023年10月18日 Moka, 全员体验更好的人力资源管理系统 相关文章 构建高效管理职位系统：优化组织运作的关键 在现代企业中，管理职位系统扮演… 社招系统常用的功能有哪些呢？ 如今市场上想要招聘到一个合适的… 求职招聘管理软件：连接求职者与招聘者，优化招聘体验 在现代化的求职与招聘环境中，求… 招聘系统 招聘管理系统 招聘流程管理 搭建人才库 海外ATS招聘系统 Moka People 人事管理系统 绩效管理系统 薪酬管理系统 组织人事管理 考勤管理系统 © 2022 北京希瑞亚斯科技有限公司 All rights reserved. 京ICP备15060035号-3 京公网安备11010802024479号 Moka 是一款新生代的 SaaS 智能化招聘管理系统， 包含三大核心模块：聚合招聘渠道，统一管理招聘流程，提升各节点转化率，促进协同； 积累企业人才库，自动且有效的进行持续激活；全方位数据统计，提供招聘洞见–全面帮助企业提升招聘效能。 产品功能 招聘流程管理 企业人才库 数据分析 客户成功 公司相关 关于我们 客户案例 加入我们 媒体报道 博客 售前咨询：400-101-6133 © 2020 北京希瑞亚斯科技有限公司.
