job_name: 审计监察部法务管理岗员工
job_title: 审计监察部法务管理岗员工
responsibilities: 四川川投能源股份有限公司（简称川投能源）于1993年在上交所上市（证券代码600674），通过一系列资产重组和稳健经营，确立了以水电清洁能源为主和铁路信息产业为辅的发展格局，逐步成长为主业稳固、业绩优良、运作规范、公司治理佳、市场形象优的上市公司，肩负着管理经营川投集团主要优质资产的重任，拥有12家投资企业，其中全资及控股企业5家：田湾河公司、川投电力、天彭电力、嘉阳电力、交大光芒；参股企业7家：雅砻江公司、国电大渡河、国电大岗山、长飞四川公司、川投售电公司、中德阿维斯公司和中德西拉子公司。 为满足审计部工作需要，现面向全社会公开招聘，有关事项公告如下： 一、招聘职位： 审计监察部法务管理岗员工1名 二、招聘人员基本条件： 1.具有良好的政治思想素质、对党忠诚，坚持实事求是、有开拓创新精神，有强烈的责任感、使命感、敬业精神； 2.忠于川投能源事业，工作业绩突出，具有较强的组织、协调能力和管理经验，有较强的分析问题和解决问题能力； 3.具有应聘岗位所需的政策、理论水平、专业管理知识和专业业务能力，具有较强的公文写作能力和良好的口头表达能力，具有较好的人际理解力以及抗压能力； 4.坚持原则，顾全大局，作风正派，秉公办事，廉洁自律，善于团结群众。 三、招聘人员任职资格： 1.中共党员(正式党员)； 2. 取得国家教育部学历认证的全日制大学本科及以上学历； 3.2017年9月21日教育部、财政部、国家发展改革委联合发布的《关于公布世界一流大学和一流学科建设高校及建设学科名单的通知》中正式确认公布的世界一流大学和一流学科建设高校的法学专业毕业生（民商法专业优先）； 4.取得法律职业资格(A证)或律师资格； 5.本科学历需具备五年以上党政机关或企业法务工作经验；硕士研究生学历需具备三年以上党政机关或企业法务工作经验； 6. 年龄不超过40周岁（年龄计算截止时间为2018年7月31日）; 7.熟悉公司法和证券监管法律、法规、政策，具备金融、管理、财务相关知识，具备较强执行、学习、沟通和决策能力； 8.身心健康； 9.具有拟引进职位所要求的其他资格条件，特别优秀的可适当放宽条件。 凡有下列情形之一者，不得报名： 1.曾受过司法机关刑事处罚的； 2.涉嫌违法、违纪正在接受审查的； 3.尚未解除党纪、政纪处分的； 4.曾被开除公职、被辞退的； 5.违反有关规定不适宜报考的。 四、薪酬待遇： 薪酬面议 五、应聘须知： 有意向者请将应聘报名表、身份证、学历学位、职业资格或职称等相关资质证书扫描件发送至招聘邮箱，邮件主题为“应聘者姓名+应聘岗位”。 联系人：王歆、叶汶欣 招聘邮箱： rlb@ctny.com.cn 。 联系电话：028-86098677、028-86098667 本公告未尽事宜，由四川川投能源股份有限公司负责解释。 简历模板： 应聘申请表.docx 岗位说明书.docx 微信公众号 手机版 关于我们 公司简介 组织架构 领导团队 企业荣誉 新闻中心 公司新闻 企业动态 最新公告 加入我们 人才招聘 联系我们 股票代码： 600674.SH  中国·四川·成都·武侯区临江西路1号川投大厦  (+86)028-86098649  (+86)028-86096948  ctny@ctny.com.cn --川投站群-- --友情链接-- 川投集团 四川川投能源股份有限公司 版权所有 © All Rights Reserved. 蜀ICP备2022021534号 川公网安备51010702003046号 隐私保护 | 版权所有 | 网站地图 

company: 四川省投资集团有限责任公司
company_name: 四川省投资集团有限责任公司
responsibilities: 四川川投能源股份有限公司（简称“川投能源”）是川投集团控股的上市公司，证券代码600674。在川投集团和公司董事会的正确领导下，川投能源通过一系列资产重组、资本营运和稳健经营，确立了以水电清洁能源为主，高铁信息产业为辅的发展格局，业已成长为主业稳固、业绩优良、运作规范、公司治理佳、市场形象好的上市公司，2018年6月公司成功入选MSCI新兴市场指数和MSCI ACWI全球指数。 截至2018年末，川投能源总资产320亿元，净资产253亿元，总股本44亿股，总市值382亿元。主要投资企业有：雅砻江公司、田湾河公司、川投电力、交大光芒、天彭电力、国电大渡河公司、三峡新能源、乐飞光电等。为满足工作需要，现面向全社会公开招聘，有关事项公告如下： 一、招聘职位： 办公室副主任岗1名，党群部党群管理岗一般员工1名。 二、招聘人员基本条件： 1.具有良好的政治思想素质、拥护中国共产党的路线方 针政策，坚持实事求是； 2.忠于川投能源事业，工作踏实、爱岗敬业； 3.具有应聘岗位所需的政策、理论水平、专业管理知识 和专业业务能力，具有较强的公文写作能力和良好的口头表达能力，具有较好的人际理解力以及抗压能力； 4.坚持原则，顾全大局，作风正派，秉公办事，廉洁自律，善于团结群众。 三、招聘人员任职资格： （一）办公室副主任 1.国内双一流全日制大学本科及以上学历，中文、行政管理、企业管理、档案管理等相关专业，具备文秘、企业管理、档案管理相关知识； 2.5年以上办公室文秘相关工作经验； 3.熟练使用MS Office，特别是Word、Execl、PPT等办公软件； 4.较强的公文写作能力，良好的文字和口头表达能力； 5.良好的人际交往与沟通协调能力； 6.年龄不超过40周岁，能适应随领导出差和加班; 7.身心健康。 （二）党群管理岗一般员工 1.中共党员； 2.国内双一流全日制大学本科及以上学历，汉语言文学、哲学、法律、新闻、行政管理类相关专业； 3.5年及以上党群或新闻媒体工作经历； 4.熟悉党建、工会、宣传、活动组织等方面相关知识和工作流程，具有较强的文字功底和写作能力、沟通协调和组织执行能力； 5.熟练掌握PPT、音频视频编辑等应用软件； 6.年龄不超过40周岁，能适应经常性加班和出差; 7.身心健康。 （四）凡有下列情形之一者，不得报名： 1.曾受过司法机关刑事处罚的； 2.涉嫌违法、违纪正在接受审查的； 3.尚未解除党纪、政纪处分的； 4.曾被开除公职、被辞退的； 5.违反有关规定不适宜报考的。 注：1.上述应聘人员中特别优秀的，条件可适当放宽，但需经考察组认定后方可作为竞聘人选。 2.应聘人员的年龄及任职计算截止时间为2019年2月28日。 四、薪酬待遇： 薪酬面议 五、应聘须知： 有意向者请将应聘报名表、身份证、学历学位、职业资格或职称等相关资质证书扫描件，于报名截止时间（2019年3月8日下午17:00）前发送至招聘邮箱，邮件主题为“应聘者姓名+应聘岗位”。 联系人：王女士、叶女士 招聘邮箱： rlb@ctny.com.cn 。 联系电话：028-86098677、028-86098667 本公告未尽事宜，由四川川投能源股份有限公司负责解释。 简历模板： 应聘申请表.doc 微信公众号 手机版 关于我们 公司简介 组织架构 领导团队 企业荣誉 新闻中心 公司新闻 企业动态 最新公告 加入我们 人才招聘 联系我们 股票代码： 600674.SH  中国·四川·成都·武侯区临江西路1号川投大厦  (+86)028-86098649  (+86)028-86096948  ctny@ctny.com.cn --川投站群-- --友情链接-- 川投集团 四川川投能源股份有限公司 版权所有 © All Rights Reserved. 蜀ICP备2022021534号 川公网安备51010702003046号 隐私保护 | 版权所有 | 网站地图 

responsibilities: 四川川投能源股份有限公司（简称“川投能源”）是川投集团控股的上市公司，证券代码600674。在川投集团和公司董事会的正确领导下，川投能源通过一系列资产重组、资本营运和稳健经营，确立了以水电清洁能源为主，高铁信息产业为辅的发展格局，业已成长为主业稳固、业绩优良、运作规范、公司治理佳、市场形象好的上市公司，2018年6月公司成功入选MSCI新兴市场指数和MSCI ACWI全球指数。 截至2018年末，川投能源总资产320亿元，净资产253亿元，总股本44亿股，总市值382亿元。主要投资企业有：雅砻江公司、田湾河公司、川投电力、交大光芒、天彭电力、国电大渡河公司、三峡新能源、乐飞光电等。为满足工作需要，现面向全社会公开招聘，有关事项公告如下： 一、招聘职位： 办公室副主任岗1名，党群部党群管理岗一般员工1名。 二、招聘人员基本条件： 1.具有良好的政治思想素质、拥护中国共产党的路线方 针政策，坚持实事求是； 2.忠于川投能源事业，工作踏实、爱岗敬业； 3.具有应聘岗位所需的政策、理论水平、专业管理知识 和专业业务能力，具有较强的公文写作能力和良好的口头表达能力，具有较好的人际理解力以及抗压能力； 4.坚持原则，顾全大局，作风正派，秉公办事，廉洁自律，善于团结群众。 三、招聘人员任职资格： （一）办公室副主任 1.国内双一流全日制大学本科及以上学历，中文、行政管理、企业管理、档案管理等相关专业，具备文秘、企业管理、档案管理相关知识； 2.5年以上办公室文秘相关工作经验； 3.熟练使用MS Office，特别是Word、Execl、PPT等办公软件； 4.较强的公文写作能力，良好的文字和口头表达能力； 5.良好的人际交往与沟通协调能力； 6.年龄不超过40周岁，能适应随领导出差和加班; 7.身心健康。 （二）党群管理岗一般员工 1.中共党员； 2.国内双一流全日制大学本科及以上学历，汉语言文学、哲学、法律、新闻、行政管理类相关专业； 3.5年及以上党群或新闻媒体工作经历； 4.熟悉党建、工会、宣传、活动组织等方面相关知识和工作流程，具有较强的文字功底和写作能力、沟通协调和组织执行能力； 5.熟练掌握PPT、音频视频编辑等应用软件； 6.年龄不超过40周岁，能适应经常性加班和出差; 7.身心健康。 （四）凡有下列情形之一者，不得报名： 1.曾受过司法机关刑事处罚的； 2.涉嫌违法、违纪正在接受审查的； 3.尚未解除党纪、政纪处分的； 4.曾被开除公职、被辞退的； 5.违反有关规定不适宜报考的。 注：1.上述应聘人员中特别优秀的，条件可适当放宽，但需经考察组认定后方可作为竞聘人选。 2.应聘人员的年龄及任职计算截止时间为2019年2月28日。 四、薪酬待遇： 薪酬面议 五、应聘须知： 有意向者请将应聘报名表、身份证、学历学位、职业资格或职称等相关资质证书扫描件，于报名截止时间（2019年3月8日下午17:00）前发送至招聘邮箱，邮件主题为“应聘者姓名+应聘岗位”。 联系人：王女士、叶女士 招聘邮箱： rlb@ctny.com.cn 。 联系电话：028-86098677、028-86098667 本公告未尽事宜，由四川川投能源股份有限公司负责解释。 简历模板： 应聘申请表.doc 微信公众号 手机版 关于我们 公司简介 组织架构 领导团队 企业荣誉 新闻中心 公司新闻 企业动态 最新公告 加入我们 人才招聘 联系我们 股票代码： 600674.SH  中国·四川·成都·武侯区临江西路1号川投大厦  (+86)028-86098649  (+86)028-86096948  ctny@ctny.com.cn --川投站群-- --友情链接-- 川投集团 四川川投能源股份有限公司 版权所有 © All Rights Reserved. 蜀ICP备2022021534号 川公网安备51010702003046号 隐私保护 | 版权所有 | 网站地图 

requirements: 工作职责 采购生态寻源 ： 负责智能 辅助驾驶域控制器ADCU、 座舱域控制器 Headunit，或其他车身域控 系统 设备的原材料采购寻源工作。主要偏向电子类半导体物料。需要负责供应商资源寻找，RFQ与报价处理，价格谈判，合同签署，供应商关系维护，分类原材料 供应商 管理策略等 负责与集团内部的跨部门采购部门协作，共同推进采购寻源定点， 成本改善，价格信息收集 等工作。例如全球采购平台的相关产品线采购 团队 ，以及ODM工厂的采购团队等 与零件工程师配合，改善BOM零件选型策略，BOM优化，变更管理， 成本分析与优化， VAVE等工作 供应链运营： 参与新业务/项目报价流程，负责报价过程中的BOM成本信息收集整理，并与成本经理配合工作，持续优化改善 负责收集整理周报、月报等供应链相关会议资料。主持并整理会议纪要以及待办项，并跟踪落实。 协同研发、质量、运营等部门，优化供应链相关的流程、规范、体系， 持续 优化成本 并改善部门工作效率 任职要求 学历与专业 计算机、软件工程、电子工程、自动化或相关专业本科及以上学历 工作经验 8 年以上汽车电子 行业采购、经营、运营等端到端的业务相关经验 其中至少 5 年以上智能座舱或 智能辅助驾驶产品相关企业工作经验 技术技能 精通 汽车电子行业采购流程，包含供应商开发，选型，报价，定点，合同签署等 精通汽车电子行业客户报价流程，包含BOM成本，生产费用，研发设备分摊等。同时理解Business Case核算规则，具备一定的财务知识 熟练掌握Office，如Excel制表制图，PPT编制与美化等 软技能 具备出色的逻辑思维、问题分析与解决能力 具备良好的沟通协调能力，能够有效推动跨团队项目进展 加分项 具备SAP系统操作经验 具备业务导向的经营和运营工作经验，例如business case分析与报告等 Additional

requirements: 岗位职责： 1. 产品营销全生命周期管理（核心） 1.1 独立负责ThinkBook产品从市场需求分析、客户群研究、产品导入到RTM（Route to Market）策略制定及落地。 1.2 统筹新品上市全过程（上市节奏、传播策略、渠道打法、定价策略）。 1.3 构建产品从预热、爆发到长尾的全周期营销体系 2. 整合营销与增长驱动 2.1 参与年度及重点节点整合营销campaign 2.2 打通电商平台、渠道销售、内容营销、品牌传播，实现全链路转化 2.3 基于用户洞察与数据分析，持续优化营销策略与ROI 3. 品牌与产品价值输出 3.1 基于品牌主张与产品定位，制定清晰的产品传播策略与核心卖点 3.2 带领团队围绕目标客群进行精细化运营与内容策划，联动Marketing团队输出品牌价值与整合传播内容（campaign / IP /内容营销） 岗位要求： 1. 5-8年及以上IT/3C行业产品营销经验 2. 有PC行业主流品牌产品营销负责人或关键岗位经验者优先 3. 有完整产品上市或整合营销项目操盘经验 Additional
responsibilities: 1. 产品营销全生命周期管理（核心） 1.1 独立负责ThinkBook产品从市场需求分析、客户群研究、产品导入到RTM（Route to Market）策略制定及落地。 1.2 统筹新品上市全过程（上市节奏、传播策略、渠道打法、定价策略）。 1.3 构建产品从预热、爆发到长尾的全周期营销体系 2. 整合营销与增长驱动 2.1 参与年度及重点节点整合营销campaign 2.2 打通电商平台、渠道销售、内容营销、品牌传播，实现全链路转化 2.3 基于用户洞察与数据分析，持续优化营销策略与ROI 3. 品牌与产品价值输出 3.1 基于品牌主张与产品定位，制定清晰的产品传播策略与核心卖点 3.2 带领团队围绕目标客群进行精细化运营与内容策划，联动Marketing团队输出品牌价值与整合传播内容（campaign / IP /内容营销）

requirements: 岗位职责 1、 直接负责中央框采平台的高质量入围和平台商管理、以及sell out和sell in管理，对份额目标负责 2、 管理全国框采平台的高质量入围以及平台商管理，以及SELL OUT.对框采份额目标负责； 3、全权负责框采渠道终端出货（Sell Out）全链路管理，监控区域出货数据，联动销售团队解决动销瓶颈，保障渠道库存健康； 4、制定框采渠道份额提升策略，跟进目标拆解与落地，对全国框架采购渠道整体份额目标的达成负责； 5、定期输出框采渠道运营分析报告，总结入围与动销问题，输出优化方案，持续提升渠道运营效率。 。 岗位要求 1、经验背景：政企渠道、框架采购相关工作经验，熟悉中央及地方各级框采平台的入围规则与运作流程； 2、具备清晰的结构化思维，对数据敏感度高，能通过出货数据快速识别渠道问题并给出落地方案； 3、拥有优秀的跨部门沟通协调能力，能够联动销售、售前、商务等多团队推进项目，整合内外部资源； 4、熟悉渠道Sell Out动销管理逻辑，掌握框采渠道动销提升方法，有成功份额提升案例优先； 5、能够适应不定期全国出差，结果导向，抗压能力强，认可联想创业5.0文化，自驱力与责任心强。 Additional
responsibilities: 1、 直接负责中央框采平台的高质量入围和平台商管理、以及sell out和sell in管理，对份额目标负责 2、 管理全国框采平台的高质量入围以及平台商管理，以及SELL OUT.对框采份额目标负责； 3、全权负责框采渠道终端出货（Sell Out）全链路管理，监控区域出货数据，联动销售团队解决动销瓶颈，保障渠道库存健康； 4、制定框采渠道份额提升策略，跟进目标拆解与落地，对全国框架采购渠道整体份额目标的达成负责； 5、定期输出框采渠道运营分析报告，总结入围与动销问题，输出优化方案，持续提升渠道运营效率。 。

requirements: 岗位职责： 1. 活动策划与落地执行： 负责组织开展公司全年市场活动，包括但不限于自有品牌活动、峰会论坛、行业展会、交流沙龙、内部文化活动等，能独立推进立项、策划、执行、复盘等流程并确保高品质交付。 2. 全流程标准化管理： 对活动目标、预算管控、产出评估、供应商管理等结果负责，跟踪活动执行数据，评估活动效果，复盘经验，持续提升。 3. 品牌及生态资源整合： 能高效协同行业、生态、业务等内外部资源，以业务目标为导向进行整合策划，匹配活动呈现，助力业务提升。 4. 品牌一致性管理： 负责品牌市场活动核心内容的管理把控，包括VI规范、品牌物料、白皮书、案例集等的定期更新及优化，确保客户触点的品牌一致性。 岗位要求： 1. 硕士研究生及以上学历，市场营销、广告学等相关专业优先。 2. 5年以上品牌营销或活动管理经验，有大厂或知名公关公司200人以上规模会议独立操盘成功经验。 3. 英文流利，优秀的中文文字功底及品牌策划能力，熟悉创投行业者优先。 4. 目标导向，具备出色的沟通协调能力及团队合作精神，能处理多线程任务，抗压能力强。 Additional
responsibilities: 1. 活动策划与落地执行： 负责组织开展公司全年市场活动，包括但不限于自有品牌活动、峰会论坛、行业展会、交流沙龙、内部文化活动等，能独立推进立项、策划、执行、复盘等流程并确保高品质交付。 2. 全流程标准化管理： 对活动目标、预算管控、产出评估、供应商管理等结果负责，跟踪活动执行数据，评估活动效果，复盘经验，持续提升。 3. 品牌及生态资源整合： 能高效协同行业、生态、业务等内外部资源，以业务目标为导向进行整合策划，匹配活动呈现，助力业务提升。 4. 品牌一致性管理： 负责品牌市场活动核心内容的管理把控，包括VI规范、品牌物料、白皮书、案例集等的定期更新及优化，确保客户触点的品牌一致性。

requirements: 我们正在寻找一位具有丰富经验和深厚技术背景的高级音频工程师加入我们的团队。该职位将专注于平板电脑的音频技术创新和开发工作。作为我们团队的一员，您将负责新技术研究与开发工作，并且推动音频系统的设计、开发和集成，确保我们的产品在市场上保持领先地位。 Additional

requirements: Job Responsibilities: Lead the design, develop, and implement AI Agent and tools for supply chain-related business scenarios, covering both frontend and backend logic. Drive the engineering and deployment of LLM applications, including backend services; explore innovative applications of large language models within the supply chain domain to enhance operational efficiency. Take ownership of core tools/modules and frameworks, participating in system architecture design and technical decision-making. Collaborate effectively with business stakeholders and algorithm engineers to ensure technical feasibility, propose system architecture solutions, and drive optimal user experience implementation. Lead and participate in the design and development of AI applications and tools and AI building blocks. Participate in or lead troubleshooting and performance optimization efforts to ensure system availability, stability, and scalability. Participate in or lead the development of team technical infrastructure, continuously improving full-stack engineering efficiency and optimizing the business experience. Job Requirements Familiarity with mainstream AI Agent frameworks and design concepts; proficient in using tools and framework such as LangChain, Langraph, AutoGPT, Harness, and practical AI engineering implementation experience. Understanding of LLM model invocation pipelines, tool usage, OpenAI API specifications, and prompt optimization techniques. Proficient with architectures design and implement of React, ToT, Plan & Execute Hands-on experience with Agent Memory and Context management design and development. Proficiency in Python; familiar with high-concurrency and multi-threaded development; experience with SSE, Socket programming, and streaming frameworks; experience in designing and developing distributed, high-concurrency systems. Proficient in mainstream Python web frameworks such as Django, Flask, or FastAPI. Proficient in middleware technologies such as MySQL/PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, etc. Familiar with Vue or React and their core ecosystems; experience with common UI component libraries such as ElementUI or Ant Design. Solid understanding of W3C standards, HTML4/HTML5, CSS2/CSS3, and ES5/ES6. Experience with build tools like Webpack or Vite; practical skills in performance tuning, code splitting, and Tree-Shaking. Strong computer science foundation and algorithmic thinking. Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills; strong sense of responsibility, initiative, and teamwork abilities. Passionate about tracking advancements in AI and full-stack technologies; eager to learn and share; maintains a positive communication attitude and can thrive under pressure. A bachelor's degree or above in computer science, artificial intelligence, data science, software engineering, mathematics, or a related field is required; a master's or doctoral degree is preferred. Ability to have good communicate in English, both written and verbal. 5+ years of experience in software backend development, including 2+ years focused on AI Agent systems. Practical business project implementation experience with LLM application development. In-depth research or practical project experience in multi-agent interaction, agent collaboration, or Agent engineering systems. Proficiency in machine learning and deep learning algorithms; end-to-end experience in modeling, design, and development of simulation or prediction projects. Hands-on experience in development of AI + automation. Additional

requirements: AI Services Finance Controller Position Summary The AI Services Finance Controller serves as the primary finance business partner for the AI Services organization. The role leads financial planning, reporting, commercial analysis, and process development for a complex and rapidly evolving business. In addition to the core finance responsibilities, this role will help drive the Finance team’s AI transformation by identifying opportunities and building practical AI-enabled solutions to improve reporting, analysis, and finance operations. Key Responsibilities: Lead budgeting, forecasting, monthly performance reviews, and management reporting for the AI Services business. Identify finance use cases for AI and automation, and build practical solutions using tools such as OpenClaw, Copilot, Python, or similar technologies. Consolidate AI Services revenue across multiple teams and ensure accurate, timely reporting to Corporate Finance and executive leadership. Provide financial insights and business cases to support investments, new offerings, and growth decisions. Support pricing, deal reviews, cost modeling, and project profitability analysis. Partner with Offering, Sales, and Delivery leaders to improve business and financial performance. Establish scalable finance processes, reporting flows, and controls for a growing business. Coordinate with Treasury, Corporate Finance, Controllership, and Accounting on reporting, funding, and compliance matters. Basic Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, Technology, or a related discipline. 5+ years of experience in FP&A, controllership, commercial finance, or finance transformation. Strong experience in forecasting, financial reporting, performance analysis, and business partnering. Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder-management skills. Preferred Qualifications Hands-on experience with AI, coding, data analytics, or workflow automation, with the ability to develop and implement practical finance solutions. Experience supporting professional services, consulting, AI, or technology services. Knowledge of ERP systems, financial reporting tools, and BI platforms. Experience improving finance processes in a global, fast-changing organization We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Strong problem-solving and critical-thinking skills. Comfortable learning new technologies and adapting in a fast-paced environment. Experience with network performance evaluation and tuning. Knowledge about AI workload characteristics and software stack such as collective communications. Ability to innovate and publish at top conferences. requirements: 岗位概述 负责联想企业数字化办公领域端到端的AI应用技术架构设计和技术路线规划， 聚焦智能协作、流程自动化、知识管理、文档智能处理等核心办公场景， 搭建具备高可扩展性与安全性的 AI 技术体系，打通业务需求并 主导生成式AI、大模型、智能体等AI技术在数字化办公场景的创新应用与规模化落地 ， 为企业创造可量化的业务价值。 岗位职责 技术路线规划：深度洞察企业办公业务痛点与行业趋势，制定 AI 技术在数字化办公领域的技术路线图及落地优先级。 架构设计：主导AI 应用架构全流程设计，涵盖数据层、算法层、服务层与应用层，平衡功能性、性能、安全性与成本，确保架构兼容联想现有 IT 生态且具备横向扩展能力。 技术落地： 主导大模型在企业办公场景的落地架构，包括RAG知识增强、Agent智能体、多智能体架构、多模态交互等技术应用 。 跨域协同：协调各业务、DT、IT团队，将业务需求转化为可落地的 AI 解决方案，推动跨部门项目高效执行，确保技术方案与业务价值对齐。 技术治理：建立 AI 应用全生命周期管理体系， 制定AI技术标准和规范， 保障系统稳定迭代与风险可控。 技术引领：跟踪 AI 前沿技术动态，引入适配办公场景的创新技术与方案，主导技术预研与原型验证，提升团队技术竞争力。 岗位要求 计算机/人工智能/软件工程相关专业，8年以上IT研发经验，其中5年以上企业级AI应用架构设计和开发经验。 精通大语言模型（LLM）的应用架构、微调技术、部署优化及生态工具（如LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex等）。 深入理解深度学习框架（如PyTorch, TensorFlow）和模型服务化技术（如Triton, vLLM）。 精通一种以上主流编程语言（如Python, Java, Go, C++），并具备卓越的系统设计能力。 熟练掌握微服务、云原生、分层架构等设计模式，具备复杂系统性能优化、高可用架构设计及技术选型决策经验，能独立输出完整架构方案。 熟悉Kubernetes、Docker等技术栈。 对系统安全、数据隐私保护及企业IT治理有深刻理解和实战经验。 有企业级AI项目落地经验， 理解企业办公系统（OA、CRM、协同工具）集成逻辑， 熟悉数字化办公、协作管理等B端场景优先。 对 AI 技术趋势保持高度敏感，具备技术预研与创新能力，能快速将前沿技术转化为实际应用。 具备复杂技术难题攻坚能力，能快速定位问题并给出最优解决方案。 具备良好的英文听说读写能力，能熟练使用英文与海外同事 沟通协作，可以高效阅读和准确理解最新的英文AI技术文章。 具备较强的技术领导力和跨团队协作能力，能有效推动复杂系统落地实施。 Additional

requirements: Job Responsibilities： Participate in the formulation of SSG R&D AI strategy by analyzing market dynamics, technology trends, and emerging opportunities to support strategic planning and business growth. Research, evaluate, and assess the latest developments in Hybrid AI and Generative AI technologies, providing innovative recommendations and forward-looking insights for enterprise applications. Identify opportunities and challenges related to AI adoption in enterprise environments, delivering data-driven strategic recommendations that support business objectives and solution innovation. Continuously monitor AI industry advancements and prepare technical analysis reports to support organizational decision-making and long-term technology planning. Study emerging Generative AI technologies, including multimodal and multi-model systems, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and AI agents, and evaluate their potential impact on software products and solutions. Assess the feasibility, risks, and commercial value of AI technologies, providing recommendations to optimize investment, adoption strategies, and technology roadmaps. Evaluate existing AI architectures and solution designs, recommending enhancements and optimizations to align with the rapid evolution of AI technologies and industry best practices. Deliver AI technology trend sharing sessions, knowledge transfer activities, and training programs for relevant teams and stakeholders within SSG. Contribute to the development of technical documentation, research reports, and solution materials while promoting the adoption of emerging AI technologies across projects and initiatives. Support the design and implementation of AI ethics, governance, and compliance frameworks to ensure AI applications align with Responsible AI principles and organizational standards. Job Requirements： Strong understanding of Artificial Intelligence, Generative AI, and Hybrid AI technologies, with the ability to evaluate emerging trends and their potential business impact. Proven ability to conduct technology research, market analysis, and strategic assessments, translating findings into actionable recommendations and technology roadmaps. Familiarity with modern AI technologies and architectures, including multimodal and multi-model AI systems, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI agents, and related solution frameworks. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to assess technology feasibility, risks, commercial value, and implementation considerations. Ability to evaluate and optimize AI solution architectures while maintaining awareness of evolving industry standards and technological advancements. Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to share technical insights, deliver training, and engage effectively with both technical and business stakeholders. Experience preparing technical documentation, research reports, strategic recommendations, and executive-level analysis materials. Knowledge of AI ethics, governance, compliance practices, and Responsible AI principles, with the ability to support their implementation in enterprise environments. Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively across cross-functional teams and contribute to strategic technology initiatives in a dynamic environment. Additional

Evaluate existing AI architectures and solution designs, recommending enhancements and optimizations to align with the rapid evolution of AI technologies and industry best practices. Deliver AI technology trend sharing sessions, knowledge transfer activities, and training programs for relevant teams and stakeholders within SSG. Contribute to the development of technical documentation, research reports, and solution materials while promoting the adoption of emerging AI technologies across projects and initiatives. Support the design and implementation of AI ethics, governance, and compliance frameworks to ensure AI applications align with Responsible AI principles and organizational standards. Job

experience: 完整操盘经销商健康度、库存销量预测两类 AI 建模落地项目，模型可落地并改善渠道实际经营指标
requirements: 岗位描述 以 AI 与大数据为双引擎，统筹全国线下渠道全链路数据资产建设与智能决策体系搭建，落地经销商健康度、库存风险、增长潜力等 AI 预测评估模型，构建 “感知 - 诊断 - 预测 - 决策” 全链智能闭环，驱动线下渠道从经验驱动向 AI 驱动范式跃迁，立足渠道经营痛点落地智能化方案，赋能渠道提质增效。 岗位职责 1、AI 模型与数据基座建设：打通全渠道多源异构数据，搭建标准化指标库；运用机器学习算法搭建经销商健康度分级、库存风险预判核心 AI 模型，沉淀可复用智能资产； 2、智能决策驾驶舱架构统筹：分层设计全国 / 区域 / 门店四级 AI 驱动决策平台，集成异常检测、归因分析、趋势预测、策略推荐能力，独立完成渠道智能诊断看板搭建落地； 3、AI 闭环进化体系：构建 "感知→诊断→预测→推荐→反馈" 全链路闭环，依托驾驶舱数据自动归因渠道痛点、预判经营风险，结合一线业务反馈迭代优化模型； 4、变革推动与组织赋能：统筹 AI 工具矩阵推广落地，培训业务团队掌握 AI 分析能力；联动销售、供应链、IT 等部门，将 AI 洞察转化为智能补货、经销商分层经营等渠道经营决策； 5、AI 专项战略洞察：运用预测模型与仿真模拟，输出增长预测、风险预警、经销商分群洞察，支撑天禧 AI、即时零售、门店拓展等核心业务战略。 岗位要求： 1、行业业务功底扎实：3-5 年 3C / 家电线下渠道经营、商业分析复合经验，深度熟悉经销商、门店、进销存全链路生意逻辑，能精准识别渠道经营痛点； 2、核心项目落地经验：完整操盘经销商健康度、库存销量预测两类 AI 建模落地项目，模型可落地并改善渠道实际经营指标； 3、技术实操能力达标：熟练 SQL、Power BI/Tableau，掌握 Python 机器学习建模，可独立搭建分层级渠道智能决策驾驶舱； 4、平台项目统筹能力：具备全国性渠道 AI 项目全流程推动经验，擅长跨部门协同，能用业务语言向销售团队解读 AI 分析结论； 5、经营导向思维：以渠道生意提效为核心目标，主动下沉一线获取业务反馈，持续迭代 AI 工具与分析方案。 Additional
responsibilities: 1、AI 模型与数据基座建设：打通全渠道多源异构数据，搭建标准化指标库；运用机器学习算法搭建经销商健康度分级、库存风险预判核心 AI 模型，沉淀可复用智能资产； 2、智能决策驾驶舱架构统筹：分层设计全国 / 区域 / 门店四级 AI 驱动决策平台，集成异常检测、归因分析、趋势预测、策略推荐能力，独立完成渠道智能诊断看板搭建落地； 3、AI 闭环进化体系：构建 "感知→诊断→预测→推荐→反馈" 全链路闭环，依托驾驶舱数据自动归因渠道痛点、预判经营风险，结合一线业务反馈迭代优化模型； 4、变革推动与组织赋能：统筹 AI 工具矩阵推广落地，培训业务团队掌握 AI 分析能力；联动销售、供应链、IT 等部门，将 AI 洞察转化为智能补货、经销商分层经营等渠道经营决策； 5、AI 专项战略洞察：运用预测模型与仿真模拟，输出增长预测、风险预警、经销商分群洞察，支撑天禧 AI、即时零售、门店拓展等核心业务战略。

requirements: 岗位职责： 1、设计AI产品的技术架构，确保其可扩展性、高性能和安全性。 2、领导关键技术攻关，固化最佳实践，提升团队AI技术能力。 3、设计制定AI产品技术路线图和优先级。 岗位要求： 1、计算机科学、人工智能、数据科学等相关领域的硕士及以上学位。 2、5年以上技术架构设计经验，有成功领导大型AI项目或数字化转型的经历。 3、精通软件工程，熟悉大模型推理优化、微调，智能体协同等技术。 4、出色的沟通表达能力和系统架构思维。 Additional
responsibilities: 1、设计AI产品的技术架构，确保其可扩展性、高性能和安全性。 2、领导关键技术攻关，固化最佳实践，提升团队AI技术能力。 3、设计制定AI产品技术路线图和优先级。

requirements: 岗位职责 （一）业务经营与市场目标管理 承接AI主机产品线年度经营指标，负责营收规模、毛利结构、客户增长、市场份额等核心目标拆解与落地，搭建可复盘、可迭代的营销业务经营体系； 深度研判AI主机行业赛道、算力硬件、边缘智能主机、行业定制主机市场趋势，跟踪上下游产业链、政策合规、成本价格体系变化，输出中长期市场研判与业务规划。 （二）端到端产品营销全流程操盘 贯通AI主机从市场洞察、产品定位、上市包装、定价策略、渠道铺设、市场推广到销售转化的 端到端营销闭环 ，打通产研、销售、供应链、品牌、售前体系，保障产品从研发到商业化高效落地； 负责产品市场化包装，包含产品卖点提炼、解决方案输出、行业白皮书、营销物料、标杆案例打造，适配制造业、服务业、教培、数字内容创作，OPC等多应用场景。 （三）产品竞争力体系建设 对标行业竞品AI主机产品，从硬件配置、算力性能、软件适配、系统生态、成本定价、服务体系多维度搭建差异化竞争力； 统筹产品迭代营销反馈，汇总市场、客户、渠道痛点，反向驱动产品定义、软硬件优化、功能升级，形成营销-产品迭代正向循环； 建立产品护城河，完善技术合规、数据保密、硬件安全等合规体系，适配ToB行业客户准入要求。 （四）渠道推广与品牌市场运营 制定AI主机全域营销策略，覆盖直销、代理商、行业集成商、生态合作渠道，搭建渠道分级管理与激励体系； 统筹行业展会、技术沙龙、标杆客户发布会、行业媒体投放、内容种草等营销动作，提升品牌行业知名度与行业渗透率； 负责头部标杆客户打造、行业案例沉淀，完成重点行业圈层突破，建立行业口碑壁垒。 （五）团队统筹与协同管理 牵头营销相关团队统筹管理，协同产品、研发、供应链、销售、售后团队，推进跨部门项目落地； 搭建营销SOP流程，沉淀方法论、营销工具、行业资料库，为团队规模化扩张赋能。 岗位要求： （一）AI与软件产品能力 熟悉AI主机、算力硬件、AI软硬件融合应用场景，精通ToB硬件产品从市场调研、定位定价到商业化落地的全流程； 具备AI产品实操经验，了解行业数据合规、信息安全、硬件保密规范，严格把控产品营销合规性； 理解AI大模型、边缘计算、本地部署等技术逻辑，可精准提炼软硬件产品技术卖点，完成技术向商业化语言转化。 （二）硬件行业专业背景 优先具备服务器、AI主机、工控硬件、算力终端、智能硬件相关行业背景，能够清晰理解 软硬件结合产品营销逻辑 ； 熟悉硬件供应链、成本结构、生产交付流程，可结合供应链情况制定合理定价、备货及上市节奏。 （三）综合软性能力 具备极强的自主学习与快速适配能力，可快速吃透AI硬件技术、行业政策、竞品体系，适配技术密集型科技团队节奏； 商业敏感度高，数据思维强，擅长经营分析、投入产出测算，能够以结果为导向把控业务盈利模型； 优秀的商务谈判、跨部门协同、公众宣讲能力，可独立对接大客户、行业渠道、媒体及合作方。 Additional

requirements: 你将加入联想亚太人力资源服务中心团队，一个温馨欢乐成就感爆棚的团队，主要负责为联想亚太14个国家和地区共10000多名员工/经理/人力资源合作伙伴提供人力资源所有模块以及系统的咨询服务。 职位描述： · 主要负责亚太地区员工包括人力资源系统指引，薪酬福利，组织架构，人力资源流程等等所有和人力资源相关的问题； · 如果你的日常绩效稳定优秀，还将有机会参与到跨国项目中，也可能作为讲师为亚太员工提供全英文或者日文的入职培训； · 你会参与到跨团队合作的工作中，与各国当地人事服务专员，薪酬福利团队，信息和技术化等专业团队一起为流程优化和客户体验奋斗； · 联想提供没有天花板的舞台，你将有机会在国际化公司平台和人力资源领域获得飞速成长和专业指导； · 人力资源共享服务中心全面的知识库会为你在人力资源道路上的长远发展奠定夯实的基础。 职位要求： · 日语N1或者专八； · 在日语N1/专八之上，英语六级及以上优先； · 有意愿在HR领域长期发展； · 有过人力资源相关实习经验（人力资源共享服务中心相关实习经历最佳），或有跨国公司工作经验者优先； · 具有良好的工作态度以及团队协作意识，服务意识； · 具有良好的应变及沟通能力、独立解决问题、同时解决多项任务的能力； · 熟练掌握MS Office (Word, Excel, PPT)等办公软件。

requirements: The Lenovo AI Technology Center (LATC)—Lenovo’s global AI Center of Excellence—is driving our transformation into an AI-first organization. We are assembling a world-class team of researchers, engineers, and innovators to position Lenovo and its customers at the forefront of the generational shift toward AI. Lenovo is one of the world’s leading computing companies, delivering products across the entire technology spectrum, spanning wearables, smartphones (Motorola), laptops (ThinkPad, Yoga), PCs, workstations, servers, and services/solutions. This unmatched breadth gives us a unique canvas for AI innovation, including the ability to rapidly deploy cutting-edge foundation models and to enable flexible, hybrid-cloud, and agentic computing across our full product portfolio. To this end, we are building the next wave of AI core technologies and platforms that leverage and evolve with the fast-moving AI ecosystem, including novel model and agentic orchestration & collaboration across mobile, edge, and cloud resources. This space is evolving fast and so are we. If you’re ready to shape AI at a truly global scale, with products that touch every corner of life and work, there’s no better time to join us. #LATC Job Summary: Lenovo is seeking a technical lead who will own the full agentic stack — from LLM orchestration, tool use, memory, and production deployment. Responsibilities: Design and ship agentic LLM pipelines: multi-step reasoning, tool use, reflection loops, and long-horizon planning and memory Build evaluation frameworks to measure agent reliability and safety across different tasks. Build and maintain RAG systems, vector stores, and external tool integrations Deploy and scale agent systems in production; translate relevant research into working systems Be a technical lead, working closely with other AI engineers, ML scientists, and technical product managers to put pipelines in production Keep abreast of the latest developments in AI & ML, applying cutting-edge research and methodologies to your work Required Qualifications: 6 years of industry experience in ML or applied AI with strong hands-on LLM experience (prompting, fine-tuning, inference optimization) Bachelor’s degree in computer science, applied math, physics, or a related field Experience with NLP Fluent in Python and the modern ML stack (PyTorch, Hugging Face, vLLM or equivalent) Proven experience with agentic frameworks (LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, or custom) and tool-use patterns (function calling, MCP, structured outputs) Solid grasp of RAG architecture, embedding models, and LLM evaluation methodology Strong software engineering fundamentals (python and at least one other programming language). Experience with Git, and Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) Experience deploying ML models using containerization and container orchestration technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes Preferred Requirements: PhD or Master's preferred Experience with computer vision Experience with Agile frameworks, such as Scrum and Kanban Rust experience for performance-critical inference or runtime components Ability to effectively communicate technical solutions to both technical and business audiences, both verbally and in writing The base salary range budgeted for this position in Chicago is $200k - $250k. Individuals may also be considered for bonus and/or commission. Lenovo’s various
responsibilities: Design and ship agentic LLM pipelines: multi-step reasoning, tool use, reflection loops, and long-horizon planning and memory Build evaluation frameworks to measure agent reliability and safety across different tasks. Build and maintain RAG systems, vector stores, and external tool integrations Deploy and scale agent systems in production; translate relevant research into working systems Be a technical lead, working closely with other AI engineers, ML scientists, and technical product managers to put pipelines in production Keep abreast of the latest developments in AI & ML, applying cutting-edge research and methodologies to your work Required

requirements: Job Summary: As an AI Prototyping Engineer on the LATC team, you will be the creative and technical engine that turns emerging AI ideas into tangible, working demonstrations. You will operate at the intersection of research, product, and business — rapidly building proof-of-concepts, validating technical feasibility, and communicating findings to both engineering teams and business stakeholders. This is a hands-on role for someone who thrives in ambiguity, moves fast without breaking trust, and loves making complex AI capabilities feel real and accessible. Responsibilities: Rapid Prototyping & Experimentation Design, build, and iterate on AI agent prototypes and interactive demos that showcase novel capabilities across Lenovo's product ecosystem (mobile, edge, enterprise). Explore cutting-edge agentic frameworks, LLMs, and multimodal models to evaluate their fit for Lenovo's use cases. Maintain a "prototype-first" mindset — ship working demos in days, not months. Design, implement, and test components for a AI ‑ driven development ecosystem, including model ‑ powered tools and platform services that enhance the software delivery lifecycle. Develop intelligent agents and automated workflows that streamline software build, testing, deployment, and operational tasks across CI/CD pipelines Define, evaluate, and unify APIs, namespaces, and integration patterns across contributions from multiple developers, ensuring consistent interface design and long ‑ term architectural coherence within the platform. Develop/integrate platforms for AI models and agent behaviors assessment for performance, accuracy, robustness, and fairness, and provide actionable insights to improve reliability and developer experience. Technical Feasibility & Research Translation Conduct hands-on technical investigations of new AI models, tools, and frameworks, and produce clear feasibility reports summarizing findings, trade-offs, and recommendations. Work closely with the LATC R&D team to translate research outputs into prototype-ready implementations. Identify promising technologies early and advocate for their adoption or de-risking. Cross-Team Collaboration Partner with Business Group (BG) product teams to understand real user needs and translate them into prototype specifications. Act as a technical bridge between LATC technology pillars and business stakeholders, ensuring prototypes address genuine product priorities. Work closely with mentors and team members to document findings, share insights, and contribute to non-coding project deliverables. Stakeholder Communication Present prototype demos and technical findings to internal stakeholders, including department leaders and BG partners, in a clear and compelling way. Create supporting materials (slide decks, short videos, written summaries) that communicate the "so what" of each prototype. Gather feedback from demos and rapidly incorporate it into the next iteration. Engineering Craft Write clean, well-documented prototype code that can be handed off to production engineers when a concept is validated . Contribute to shared tooling, reusable components, and internal knowledge bases that accelerate future prototyping cycles. Required Qualifications 3–5 years of software engineering experience, with at least 1 year focused on ML/AI systems or LLM-based applications. BS/MS in Computer Science, AI/ML, or related field; equivalent practical experience considered. Strong Python skills, including experience with async patterns and working with AI/ML libraries. Hands-on experience with agentic frameworks such as LangChain , LangGraph , LlamaIndex , or AutoGen . Demonstrated ability to build functional AI prototypes or demos quickly, ideally with examples to show. Comfortable working in ambiguous, fast-moving environments with shifting priorities. Strong communication skills — able to explain technical concepts to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders. Experience working across teams and gathering requirements from product or business partners. A portfolio of demos, side projects, blog posts, or open-source contributions showcasing AI work. Comfort with presentation tools and an eye for communicating ideas visually. #LATC We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. responsibilities: Rapid Prototyping & Experimentation Design, build, and iterate on AI agent prototypes and interactive demos that showcase novel capabilities across Lenovo's product ecosystem (mobile, edge, enterprise). Explore cutting-edge agentic frameworks, LLMs, and multimodal models to evaluate their fit for Lenovo's use cases. Maintain a "prototype-first" mindset — ship working demos in days, not months. Design, implement, and test components for a AI ‑ driven development ecosystem, including model ‑ powered tools and platform services that enhance the software delivery lifecycle. Develop intelligent agents and automated workflows that streamline software build, testing, deployment, and operational tasks across CI/CD pipelines Define, evaluate, and unify APIs, namespaces, and integration patterns across contributions from multiple developers, ensuring consistent interface design and long ‑ term architectural coherence within the platform. requirements: 岗位职责： 1. 负责安卓平板电脑产品前期概念设计阶段的热设计工作，包括风险评估、温升仿真、散热方案优化及验证。 2. 负责安卓平板电脑产品的系统散热开发，涵盖散热风扇、 VC/ 热管、微型液冷热泵、石墨材料、散热模组及其他散热材料的设计与应用。 3. 与软件、充电等相关团队协作，制定并优化产品温控策略，提升整机热性能表现。 4. 负责安卓平板电脑系统散热方案的技术路线规划（ Roadmap ），推动散热器件、新技术及新材料的预研、评估和导入。 5. 负责安卓平板电脑及相关产品的散热性能测试与验证工作，包括微型风扇噪音测试及相关分析。 6. 负责与散热材料供应商及公司内部相关团队沟通协作，推动项目顺利实施和问题闭环解决。 岗位要求： 1. 具备手机、平板电脑或相关消费电子产品散热开发经验，能够独立承担热设计开发工作。 2. 熟练掌握消费电子产品温升设计、热仿真及测试方法，具备较强的实验设计与动手实践能力。 3. 熟练使用热成像仪、热电偶、温箱等热测试设备，能够独立完成热性能评估与问题分析。 4. 熟练使用热仿真软件工具开展分析与优化工作，具有 6SigmaET （ Celsius EC Solver ）开发工具使用经验者优先。 5. 熟悉硬件产品开发流程，能够根据项目节点推进开发任务并确保按计划交付。 6. 具备良好的问题分析与解决能力，能够针对热设计相关问题提出有效改进方案。 7. 具备优秀的跨团队沟通协调能力，能够高效推动供应商及内部团队协同合作。 8. 具有较强的学习能力和技术创新意识，能够快速掌握并应用新技术、新材料及新产品开发方法。 Additional

requirements: XClarity One is Lenovo’s cloud-native systems management platform for operating data center infrastructure, including servers and storage devices, at enterprise scale. The platform integrates deeply with VMware and Windows to enable consistent lifecycle management, observability, and automation. Engineers working on XClarity One collaborate closely with real data center equipment and have hands-on access to the Lenovo lab in Bucharest, Romania. This role offers direct exposure to production-grade hardware and the systems that run modern data centers. *** This is a hybrid role, on site in our Morrisville, NC office at least 3 days per week. *** Description: Lenovo Research is looking for an experienced Software Engineer to join our On-Device Intelligence team within the broader PC Innovation and Ecosystem organization. This US-based team develops software and runtime capabilities that enable AI models to run efficiently and reliably on Lenovo PCs by combining on-device inference, internal PC sensor signals, and intelligent user-context algorithms. In this role, you will design, implement, optimize , and debug production-quality software for on-device AI model deployment and runtime execution. You will work closely with researchers, platform engineers, and product teams to integrate AI models into Windows-based PC experiences, improve latency, memory usage, power efficiency, and system reliability, and turn research concepts into robust prototypes, demos, and product-ready components. What You’ll Do In this role, you will design, implement, optimize , and debug production-quality software for on-device AI model deployment and runtime execution. You will work closely with researchers, platform engineers, and product teams to integrate AI models into Windows-based PC experiences, improve latency, memory usage, power efficiency, and system reliability, and turn research concepts into robust prototypes, demos, and product-ready components. This is a hybrid role, on site in our Morrisville, NC office at least 3 days per week. Basic Qualifications: BS or MS degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related technical field 5 + years of professional software development experience, preferably building Windows applications, system components, SDKs, services, or runtime software Strong programming skills in C++ and Python, with solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, debugging, multithreading, optimization, and design Hands-on experience deploying, integrating, or optimizing AI/ML models for on-device or edge inference environments Experience working with AI inference runtimes or model deployment frameworks such as ONNX Runtime, TFLite , PyTorch Mobile, DirectML , OpenVINO , RyzenAI or similar technologies Understanding of model deployment tradeoffs including latency, memory footprint, power consumption, accuracy, hardware acceleration, and runtime stability Preferred Qualifications: Experience building AI runtime components, inference pipelines, model loading/execution flows, or abstraction layers for multiple model formats and hardware backends Experience with model optimization techniques such as quantization, pruning, distillation, operator fusion, batching, caching, or hardware-specific acceleration Familiarity with PC, edge, or embedded hardware acceleration technologies such as CPU, GPU, NPU, DSP, DirectML , CUDA, OpenCL, or vendor-specific AI accelerators Experience integrating AI features into Windows applications, background services, device software, or user-facing PC experiences Strong engineering practices, including Git, unit testing, profiling, CI/CD, code review, technical documentation, and cross-functional collaboration We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: Alternant - ISR Commercial B2C Au sein de l’équipe Consumer (BtoC) , vous accompagnerez les équipes commerciales dans la gestion opérationnelle quotidienne avec nos partenaires distributeurs : Fnac, Darty, Boulanger, Carrefour, Amazon , et autres retailers clés. Référencement & Mise en avant produits Envoyer les éléments de création produit (fiches, visuels, informations logistiques…) aux enseignes. les produits sur les plateformes retailers, notamment Product Live et Alkemics. À l’aise avec Excel, outils digitaux et plateformes de référencement. requirements: Position Summary We are seeking a highly analytical and innovative Data Analytics & AI Enablement Analyst to lead the development of data-driven solutions that accelerate operational excellence and AI adoption across Latin America Service (LA) operations. This role serves as the bridge between business operations, data analytics, automation, and emerging technologies, transforming complex operational challenges into scalable analytical solutions. The position is responsible for building and maintaining the data foundation, analytical frameworks, automation capabilities, and Machine Learning initiatives that support strategic decision-making and operational performance. The successful candidate will play a key role in the organization's digital transformation journey by driving automation, improving visibility across critical supply chain processes, and enabling predictive decision-making capabilities. Build scalable data solutions that improve visibility across supply chain, inventory, service, and operational processes. Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and governance across multiple data sources and business functions. Translate business requirements into analytical solutions that support operational and strategic decision-making. AI & Machine Learning Enablement Lead the implementation and adoption of AI and Machine Learning initiatives across LA operations. Identify opportunities to leverage predictive analytics and automation to improve business outcomes. Collaborate with business leaders to define AI use cases, success metrics, and deployment strategies. Support the evolution of operational processes from reactive to predictive and intelligent decision models. Partner with cross-functional teams to streamline workflows and eliminate repetitive activities. Drive process standardization through data-driven methodologies and automation technologies. Support key business initiatives related to inventory optimization, supply planning, risk management, and cost reduction. Stakeholder Management Act as a trusted advisor to business leaders on data, analytics, automation, and AI opportunities. Collaborate with Supply Chain, Operations, IT, Engineering, Finance, and Global teams. Drive adoption of new tools, processes, and analytical capabilities throughout the organization. Qualifications Required Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Mathematics, Statistics, Supply Chain, or related field. 3+ years of experience in Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, Data Science, Supply Chain Analytics, or related areas. Strong experience with SQL, Python, and data visualization tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or similar platforms. Experience developing analytical models, automation solutions, and business intelligence frameworks. Proven ability to translate business challenges into scalable data solutions. Strong project management and stakeholder management skills. Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to influence senior leadership. Fluency in English is required to work with global teams Preferred Experience with Machine Learning, Predictive Analytics, or AI implementation projects. Experience working in Supply Chain, Service Operations, Manufacturing, or Technology environments. Familiarity with BigQuery, cloud-based analytics platforms, and modern data architecture. Knowledge of process automation technologies and workflow optimization. Advanced degree in Analytics, Data Science, Engineering, Business, or related field. Key Success Indicators Increased adoption of AI and Machine Learning capabilities across operations. Reduction of manual effort through automation and process optimization. Improved operational visibility and decision-making effectiveness. Delivery of measurable cost savings and productivity improvements. Successful execution of strategic analytics and transformation projects. Enhanced data quality, governance, and business intelligence capabilities. Additional

requirements: 岗位职责： 1. 负责 Android 系统及应用核心场景的性能优化工作，包括应用启动速度、 UI 渲染流畅度、触控响应时延及内存占用等关键指标的提升。 2. 定位并解决卡顿、掉帧、 ANR 、内存泄漏以及高负载场景下性能退化等典型性能问题。 3. 基于性能分析工具和监控数据，开展应用层至系统层的性能诊断与根因分析，持续推动性能优化方案落地。 4. 结合业务场景和产品需求，制定并实施系统化性能优化策略，提升终端设备整体使用体验。 岗位要求： 1. 具备 Android 领域性能优化经验，深入理解 Android 系统架构，熟悉 AMS 、 WMS 、 Binder 、 SurfaceFlinger 、 ART 虚拟机等核心模块原理。 2. 熟悉 Linux 内核相关机制，包括进程调度（ CFS ）、内存管理（回收与压缩）、文件系统以及 CPU/GPU 动态调频策略等。 3. 熟练使用 Perfetto 、 Systrace 、 ftrace 、 Simpleperf 、 MAT 等性能分析工具，具备从应用层到内核层的性能问题定位与分析能力。 4. 具备 Android 手机或平板设备性能调优经验者优先。 5. 熟悉主流移动平台架构及性能特性者优先，包括高通 87xx 、 88xx 、 86xx 系列以及 MTK 24M/25M 、 24E 、 25P 等平台。 6. 具备良好的英文听说能力，能够与海外团队进行日常技术沟通者优先。 Additional

Why Lenovo? At Lenovo, we believe smarter technology takes us further. We deliver bold innovation powered by AI, cloud, and intelligent devices that transform the way the world works and connects. No matter what team you join, you'll find yourself collaborating with forward-thinking innovators who are passionate about building the next generation of technology experiences. Join us to shape a future powered by intelligent transformation, where your ideas drive real change and your career grows in ways only Lenovo can offer. About the Role Lenovo's Cloud & Software business is seeking an Associate Product Manager, Hybrid AI Platform as part of our Fresh Grad Program. This position sits at the intersection of product management, agentic AI, and platform engineering. You will help build the runtime, services, and developer surfaces that let product teams across Lenovo ship agentic and hybrid AI features without having to stand up their own model routing, NPU integration, or agent infrastructure. You will contribute to a platform that spans on-device inference, cloud orchestration, and the connective tissue between them, working alongside experienced product managers, engineers, and designers. You will also receive hands-on, on-the-job training with Lenovo's product management experts to strengthen your technical and strategic leadership skills. This role is in Morrisville, NC. And operates under a hybrid schedule (three days onsite, two days remote). This position is not eligible for visa sponsorship now or in the future. Candidates must have authorization to work in the United States without the need for sponsorship, including CPT or OPT. Responsibilities Support the product strategy and roadmap for an agentic AI runtime that runs on Lenovo devices and integrates with cloud models, contributing to the developer surfaces, tooling, and packaging that make the platform usable by product teams across the company. Partner with internal product teams shipping AI features into commercial and consumer experiences to capture requirements, gather feedback, and shorten delivery timelines. Contribute to the product definition for hybrid AI workload orchestration, learning how we decide what runs on the NPU, what runs in the cloud, and how policy and routing work across cost, latency, privacy, and capability tradeoffs. Track emerging agentic patterns such as tool use, MCP, A2A, multi-step reasoning, and model routing, and help translate them into concrete platform primitives, APIs, and SDKs. Draft PRD sections, run competitive and ecosystem research, and validate ideas with engineering and internal adopters. Build and maintain business documentation, feature roadmaps, and sprint artifacts using JIRA and Confluence. Partner with engineering, design, security, and ecosystem teams to support platform releases on a predictable cadence, helping manage dependencies between platform readiness and downstream product launches. Engage with internal adopters and, over time, external ecosystem partners across silicon, OS, model providers, and ISVs to align on capabilities, interfaces, and roadmap. Bring fresh thinking to how we plan and deliver work in an AI-native world, contributing to best practice documentation and supporting Lenovo's talent pipeline by collaborating with fellow Fresh Grad Program participants. Basic Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Business Administration, Design, or a related field. Internship, co-op, capstone, or other project experience in product management, software development, design, or a closely related discipline. Demonstrated experience using JIRA and Confluence for software product lifecycle management. Familiarity with the technical primitives of modern AI products: model APIs, inference, agents, tool calling, retrieval, and the differences between on-device and cloud execution. This can come from coursework, internships, side projects, or self-directed learning. Strong analytical thinking, communication, and collaboration skills. Passion for emerging technologies, AI innovation, and continuous learning. Preferred Qualifications Hands-on experience building with LLMs, agents, MCP, or hybrid AI architectures, including personal projects and prototypes. Exposure to generative AI platforms such as Cursor, Magic Patterns or Copilot etc. for product management or development workflows. Ability to work cross-functionally and communicate complex business and technical concepts clearly through written documentation and presentations. Comfort with ambiguity and a track record of bringing structure to open-ended problems. Exposure to working with global, cross-cultural teams. requirements: We are looking for a driven, curious, and consumer-focused marketer with a passion for software experiences, AI, and emerging technology. This role is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of innovation, storytelling, and strategy—someone who can simplify complex technology into experiences that feel useful, intuitive, and exciting. As the B2B Software & Monetization Product Marketing Specialist , you will help shape how Motorola brings software experiences, enterprise solutions, and monetization platforms to market. You will serve as both the voice of the consumer and an advocate for enterprise customers throughout the product journey, ensuring experiences deliver value for businesses while remaining seamless and user-friendly. This role works cross-functionally across product management, engineering, UX design, partnerships, PR, sales, and global marketing teams. Success in this role requires a strong blend of strategic thinking, creativity, and cross-functional collaboration to deliver experiences that are intuitive, scalable, and valuable for both businesses and end users. A key aspect of this role is understanding the balance between enterprise needs, business goals, and the end-user experience. While many B2B product decisions are influenced by stakeholders such as IT teams, procurement leaders, and operations teams, the ideal candidate will champion intuitive, consumer-grade experiences while helping shape monetization opportunities that feel valuable, relevant, and thoughtfully integrated into the user journey. Scope of Responsibilities Translate complex software capabilities and monetization features into clear, compelling consumer and enterprise messaging. Develop positioning, value propositions, messaging frameworks, and go-to-market strategies for B2B software experiences and monetization platforms. Partner with product,business development, sales, engineering, UX, and business teams to influence feature direction and advocate for intuitive user experiences. Understand enterprise customer needs across different industries and help position solutions accordingly. Help shape monetization strategies and software value stories that align business goals with meaningful user experiences. Create product marketing briefs and lead integrated marketing kickoffs across cross-functional teams and agencies. Conduct competitive analysis, market research, and consumer insight gathering to identify trends and opportunities. Partner with PR, creative, sales, and regional marketing teams to develop impactful storytelling and launch strategies. Monitor product adoption, customer feedback, and usage trends to refine positioning and improve the overall experience. Qualifications : Very strong fluency in the English language as this is a global role and all key deliverables, materials and messaging for review will be in English Ability to balance enterprise priorities, business goals, and consumer-grade user experiences. 5+ years in marketing, product marketing, or related fields; experience in product AI, software, or consumer tech is a strong plus. Must possess a proven ability to achieve results in a fast-moving, dynamic environment Excellent communication, interpersonal and management skills; experience interacting with staff, colleagues, management and global cross-functional teams Bachelor's degree in Marketing or equivalent Strategic and analytical thinker who can also operate in details Be proactive, with a strong problem-solving attitude Proven time management and organizational skills Be customer-centric, exhibiting dynamic, motivated, and results-oriented creative thinking A self-starter with a proactive, problem-solving mindset and the ability to thrive in fast-paced environments. #MBG Additional

requirements: Lenovo ISG is seeking an experienced Electrical Engineer to support DC-SCM (Data Center Secure Control Module) , a BMC module compliant with OpenBMC specifications , used in Lenovo server platforms. This role focuses on electrical evaluation, validation, and issue resolution for BMC hardware throughout the product lifecycle. Key Responsibilities Perform electrical validation and debugging for DC-SCM (BMC) modules based on OpenBMC architecture . Review schematics and assess electrical design risks related to power, interfaces, and signal integrity. Analyze test results, drive root cause analysis and corrective actions for electrical issues. Work closely with R&D, Quality, Manufacturing, and suppliers to resolve BMC-related hardware problems. Support component qualification, change management, and lifecycle activities . Document and communicate validation results and technical findings. Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or related field . 7+ years of EE experience , preferably in server, BMC, or data center hardware . Solid understanding of BMC hardware, power delivery, and common interfaces (e.g. I²C, SPI, UART). Hands-on experience with electrical testing and troubleshooting . Good English communication skills . Preferred Qualifications Experience with OpenBMC-based platforms . Familiarity with server electrical validation and supplier engagement . Additional

requirements: Sr Business Development Manager - Credit Risk - Consumer & Retail Lending Financial Services / Fintech · Brazil · Argentina · Colombia · Mexico 📋 Overall Description: We are looking for an experienced and strategic credit risk leader to build and lead our consumer financing function, with a primary focus on smartphone financing and direct-to-consumer (CDC) retail lending. The ideal candidate has a proven track record of structuring credit areas from the ground up, strong analytical skills and the ability to bridge technical modeling with business strategy. In this role, you will work closely with fintech partners to design and scale credit solutions and, as we expand across Latin America, you will own the end-to-end credit risk strategy for our personal retail portfolios in Brazil and play a key role in adapting our credit frameworks to new LATAM markets — including local regulatory environments, bureau ecosystems and consumer credit behavior. This is a high-ownership role for a builder who combines analytical depth with the cross-border business fluency to operate across Brazil, Argentina, Mexico, Colombia and beyond. 🚀 Key Responsibilities: Lead the full CDC (Crédito Direto ao Consumidor) credit strategy: smartphone financing, personal loans, payroll-deductible (consignado) and retail consumer financing. Define and evolve credit policies, underwriting criteria and risk appetite for PF retail segments. Own end-to-end credit cycle: origination, behavioral scoring, portfolio monitoring, collections strategy and PDD provisioning. Govern FIDC (Fundo de Investimento em Direitos Creditórios) structures, support investor reporting and auditor relations. Lead fraud prevention: rules engines, bureau integrations and identity validation. Define and monitor portfolio KPIs: vintage curves, delinquency buckets, loss rates and profitability per cohort. Act as 2nd-line governance partner — independently challenging 1st-line credit decisions and escalating emerging risks. Partner with Product and Technology to embed risk intelligence into new product design and automated decisioning. Partner with Product, Legal, Business Development and Marketing to design credit-ready go-to-market strategies for each new country. Build and present executive-level business reports and committee materials. ✅ Skills & Requirements: 8-12 years in credit risk, with 3+ years in a senior or lead role in financial services or fintech. Deep expertise in CDC (Crédito Direto ao Consumidor) and personal retail credit — origination, behavioral scoring, collections and loss provisioning. FIDC (Fundo de Investimento em Direitos Creditórios) governance and securitization experience (liability-side investor relations). Track record in PF retail products: smartphone financing, personal loans, payroll (consignado), credit cards, or consumer installment financing. Hands-on experience with PDD/ECL provisioning and Bacen regulatory frameworks. Proven ability to build or scale credit areas from scratch in growth-stage environments. Strong data skills. Fluency in Portuguese, English and Spanish languages. Availability to work in a hybrid schedule: 3 days on-site and 2 days remote. Preferred Qualifications (these will be considered a plus): Prior exposure to credit operations in Mexico, Colombia, or Argentina — knowledge of local bureau ecosystems and regulatory frameworks. Experience with open finance/open banking data in credit decisioning. ML-based scoring (gradient boosting, logistic regression at scale). Experience with cross-border product launches or regulatory market entry processes. Passion for ESG, financial inclusion, or impact-driven lending models. 📍 This position is located at Av Chedid Jafet, 222 - Vila Olimpia - São Paulo. #MBG Additional

requirements: Summary: Business Development and Benchmark Operations Lead role focuses on enhancing a company's growth initiatives by optimizing processes, tools, and strategies. This position bridges the gap between sales, marketing, and operations, ensuring efficient workflows, data-driven decisions, and scalable business strategies. Key responsibilities include conducting market research, building strategic partnerships, and streamlining operations to increase revenue. Key Responsibilities: Identifying and Evaluating Monetization Opportunities: Analyzing market trends, competitive landscapes, and internal data to pinpoint new revenue streams and partnership opportunities. Developing and Implementing Monetization Strategies: Creating and executing plans for maximizing revenue generation from existing and new products and services. Managing Strategic Partnerships: Establishing, maintaining, and optimizing relationships with key partners to drive revenue growth and achieve business objectives. Optimizing Business Processes: Improving operational efficiency within the monetization function, including streamlining workflows, implementing new technologies, and enhancing reporting and analytics. Driving Revenue Growth: Working with sales, product, and marketing teams to implement monetization strategies and achieve revenue targets. Monitoring and Analyzing Performance: Tracking key performance indicators (KPIs) related to monetization, analyzing data to identify areas for improvement, and providing insights to stakeholders. Cross-functional Collaboration: Working closely with various internal teams, including product, engineering, sales, marketing, finance, and legal, to ensure alignment and drive successful monetization initiatives. Strategic Planning: Contributing to the development of long-term monetization strategies and roadmaps. Skills and requirements: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Proven experience in business development, strategic partnerships, or monetization strategy. Familiarity with the digital advertising landscape and monetization models. Experience with data analysis and reporting tools. Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously. Strong understanding of financial modeling and business case development. Experience in high-growth tech startups and/or advertising is preferred. Knowledge of privacy regulations (GDPR, Singapore’s PDPA, Japan’s APPI, APEC’s CBPR) a plus. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Finance or Software Development of equivalent or a related field. MBA Preferred Minimum 8 years of experience in business development Additional

requirements: We are seeking a highly analytical and proactive Component Engineer to join our ISG GP (Infrastructure Solutions Group) organization. In this role, you will be responsible for the evaluation, selection, and lifecycle management of electronic and electromechanical components for our next-generation Server and Data Center products . Working at the intersection of Hardware R&D, Global Procurement, and Quality Assurance, you will ensure that all components meet the rigorous performance, reliability, and cost standards required for enterprise-grade server environments. You will play a crucial role in mitigating supply chain risks, driving cost-reduction initiatives, and resolving complex component-level technical issues. Key Responsibilities Component Selection & Qualification: Partner with Hardware Design Engineers to define and select critical components (e.g., Memory, Storage, ICs, Power Components, VRMs, Connectors) for server motherboard and system designs. Ensure components meet enterprise-grade specifications. Alternative Sourcing & Cost Optimization: Proactively identify, evaluate, and qualify second-source alternatives to optimize material costs, reduce lead times, and prevent supply chain bottlenecks without compromising server reliability. Lifecycle & Risk Management: Monitor component lifecycles continuously. Manage and execute Product Change Notifications (PCN), End-of-Life (EOL), and Last Time Buy (LTB) processes specifically tailored to the long-lifecycle requirements of server products. AVL/AML Database Management: Maintain and ensure the accuracy of the Approved Vendor List (AVL) and Approved Manufacturer List (AML) within our PLM and ERP systems (e.g., Agile, SAP). Failure Analysis & Resolution: Lead Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for component-level failures occurring during NPI (New Product Introduction), mass production, or field returns (RMA). Drive suppliers to provide 8D reports and implement effective Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA). Supplier Technical Management: Act as the primary technical interface between ISG GP and key component suppliers. Conduct supplier audits, assess their technical roadmaps, and align their offerings with our server product strategies. Compliance & Sustainability: Ensure all selected components comply with international environmental, safety, and industry standards (e.g., RoHS, REACH, CE, UL). Qualifications & Requirements Education & EE Background: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering (EE) , Electronics Engineering, or a closely related technical field. A solid foundation in EE principles is essential for this role. Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of experience as a Component Engineer, Hardware Engineer, or FAE, preferably within the Server, Data Center, or Enterprise IT hardware industry. Additional

requirements: 🚀 Principais Responsabilida des: • Utilizar scripts, com conhecimento do produto e habilidades de comunicação para gerar vendas. • Trabalhar com banco de dados de clientes para prospectar novos clientes do mercado intermediario, • Realizar atendimento telefônico se necessário, envio de cotações, propostas de compra, e retorno das chamadas de clientes. • Introduzir produtos Lenovo, gerarando oportunidades de venda. • Propiciar relacionamento e lealdade entre o Cliente e a Lenovo. • Buscar continuamente novas formas de identificar novos clientes potenciais, desenvolviment o de banco de dados de clientes e criação de perfis. • Utilizar o sistema Lenovo CRM como a ferramenta de planejamento e atividade para as diversas tarefas: alocação de chamadas, análise de clientes, gerenciamento de funil, status de andamento, loop fechado de canal, etc. • Manter, bem como desenvolver ainda mais o relacionamento existente com seus clientes. • Trabalhar em estreita colaboração com a equipe de vendas do canal Lenovo, bem como parceiros comerciais. • Administrar quantas vezes são estabelecidas cotas que exigem fazer um número específico de chamadas ou atingir um número mínimo de vendas. • Dependendo da complexidade do componente a ser negociado e do processo de venda envolvida, é possível que haja necessidades de conhecimentos técnicos especificos. ✅ Perfil Requerido: • Direcionamos a busca para graduados ou estudantes em fase avançada da graduação, idealmente com experiência em vendas, ou que tenham atuado em posições de marketing ou administrativa s e tido contato com clientes. • É importante ter uma atitude orientada ao atendimento e excelentes habilidades de comunicação, com interesse em desenvolver um perfil comercial. • Disponibilidad e para trabalhar em um regime híbrido: 3 dias presenciais e 2 dias remotos. 📍 Esta posição tem base em 438 (Cidade Nova II), Indaiatuba, São Paulo. Additional

We are hiring a Fall 2026 Intern to join our Customer Quality team. This role is based in Morrisville, NC and will require onsite presence 5 days/week. This is a full-time (40 hours/week) position. The target start date is August 2026 with an end date of December 2026. The Customer Quality Engineering Intern will support the Commercial Customer Quality Management team. This is a hands-on position working on a variety of PC platforms, including ThinkPad, Desktop, Workstation, Visuals, ThinkEdge, & Accessories. In this role, you will expand your understanding of PC hardware, subsystems, monitors/accessories/options, as well as the Windows OS & drivers. In addition, you will work with a global team of technology experts at one of the world's leading technology firms. This hardware-based opportunity does not involve software development or software debugging, but having an understanding of programming languages, tools, and methods is useful in the role. Responsibilities: Evaluating emerging technology from both a business, technical, and user perspective Work with Product Engineers on problem reproduction and debug Functional testing on various laptops, accessories, docks, IoT devices, and other portable devices Documenting test results and findings based on the analysis performed in the lab Assisting engineers with typical laboratory work tasks including break/fix, asset management, measurements (voltage, thermal, acoustic, etc), shipping, etc Some customer field work with the engineers may be a possibility Requirements: Pursuing a bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or Computer Science Hobbyist or professional experience with PC assembly/repair preferred Self-motivated Good communication skills Good organizational skills Willingness to learn and ask questions We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Additional

requirements: The Pre-Sales Security Solution Architect will act as the technical bridge between sales teams and clients, designing tailored security solutions (firewalls, EDR, SIEM, Cloud Security) to meet customer needs. The Solution Architect will conduct technical presentations, demos, and Proof of Concepts (PoC) to drive sales, manage RFPs/RFIs, and assist in achieving revenue targets. This role requires a professional with deep knowledge of regional and in-country federal security regulations, capable of conducting targeted research to align solutions with specific customer requirements. The individual will guide customers in selecting the most appropriate products, recommend best practices for successful implementation, and develop strategic, future-ready roadmaps to support long-term success. Acting as a trusted advisor, this person will build strong customer relationships, provide expert guidance, and ensure solutions are both compliant and optimized for scalability and sustainability. Key Responsibilities include: Technical Consultation: Engage with prospects to gather requirements, analyze security risks, and design customized security architectures. Demos & PoCs: Deliver compelling technical product demonstrations and manage Proof of Concepts to showcase value. Solution Design: Build comprehensive security solutions including next-gen firewalls, WAF, DLP, and endpoint security (EDR), MDR, SIEM, NextGen SOC Solutions, VA/PT solutions, AI For Security and Security for AI. Anti-Ransomware solutions. Proposal Development: Collaborate with sales teams to prepare technical proposals, RFP/RFI responses, and commercial quotations. Relationship Management: Act as a trusted technical advisor, building strong relationships with clients and internal stakeholders. Market Intelligence: Stay updated with emerging threats, industry trends, and competitor products to refine technical positioning. Federal Security requirements: Knowledgeable about the regional Cyber security compliance requirements, Security Standards in practice in country and in region. Translate the solution into deliverables: Knowledgeable about transaling the solution into actual deliverables. Train Sales Teams: Train and impart knowledge to sales teams for pitching solutions to customers, having meaningful conversations, providing customers with required information for helping Lenovo business grow. Basic Qualifications: Suitable candidate will at least have Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering or related field with at least 10-12 years of experience in similar role 7+ years of IT security technology Pre-sales, or similar experience, preferably from a GSI 5+ years’ experience in designing and delivering solutions that leverage cyber security technologies. Have at least one of the certifications like CISSP, CISA, CRISC, CISM. Preferred Qualifications: Deep understanding of IT outsourcing services, technology industry, digital and cyber security technologies. Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to convey complex technical concepts to both technical and business stakeholders. Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously. Collaborative approach to meeting business objectives and ability to influence at all levels of matrixed organizations Experience working with global teams and conducting business internationally, supporting different time zones OSCP, CEH, SANS Certifications will be an added advantage. Excellent communication skills We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, na tional origin, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any other federal, state or local protected class Additional

requirements: We are looking for a Data & AI Analyst ( Mid-level) to support and drive Data Science and Artificial Intelligence initiatives within the Services organization, acting as a key enabler between business needs and advanced analytics solutions. This professional will play a critical role in identifying opportunities, structuring use cases, developing analytical models, and promoting a data-driven culture across Services. The role involves close collaboration with business stakeholders and external partners to ensure scalable and impactful solutions. Additionally, the analyst will act as a Data & AI evangelist, fostering adoption, educating teams, and supporting the integration of analytics into operational and strategic decision-making, ensuring alignment with corporate guidelines and business objectives. General Responsibilities · Identify opportunities to apply Data Analytics, Machine Learning, AI, and other innovative technologies within Services processes · Perform data collection, cleansing, analysis, and interpretation · Support the structuring of AI/Data Science use cases (business case, ROI, impact) · Develop dashboards, reports, automations, and exploratory analyses · Document analytical processes, models, and data flows · Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into analytical solutions · Ensure data quality, governance, and consistency · Support automation and continuous improvement initiatives · Lead or support training sessions and awareness initiatives on Data and AI usage · Act as a data-driven culture evangelist, promoting best practices Position Responsibilities: · Lead small to medium complexity Data & AI initiatives · Develop machine learning models · Design and implement data pipelines and analytical automations · Build end-to-end solutions (from problem definition to deployment, when applicable) · Influence stakeholders and support data-driven decision-making · Identify and propose new AI opportunities · Act as a technical reference for Services stakeholders · Facilitate workshops, training sessions, and ideation sessions · Advanced English level Additional

requirements: Responsibilities Deal Qualification, Shaping and Strategy Drive sales and solution strategy development, deal qualification and application of best practice sessions, facilitating these for each assigned engagement. Focus on opportunity construct and qualification parameters in support of continual qualification. Analyse client requirements to inform internal messaging and positioning in support of a qualification decision. Client Engagement Develop Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) business case for the client engagement. Develop a deep understanding of our products and services, target market and competitive landscape to deliver proposals that highlight our unique value proposition. Develop a strong understanding of the client context, footprint and strategics objectives, ensuring these are reflected across all communications and proposal documentation. Work with Sales Leaders to facilitate application of a “relationship sales” methodology to help build and enhance Lenovo/Client relationships, aligning procurement objectives and timeline with the client, and supporting the wider account team in this process. Own formal communication channels with the client. Work collaboratively with the pursuit team to organize, prepare and run real time client engagement. End to End Bid Execution Manages the bid through each sales stage, ensuring end-to-end compliance with the current company processes, corporate governance, and engaging stakeholders. Lead multi-disciplinary, geographically disperse, high-performing bid teams on assigned deals. Maintain regular cadence of calls and reviews, monitor progress and manage priorities, risks, and issues across assigned deals. Maintain accountability for the detailed bid plan, identification of staffing and associated budget estimation communication, replanning, progress tracking, achievement of milestones & win strategy. Coordinate activities related to clarifications (CQs) and their responses, to and from the client. Engage with partner companies and subcontractors (as appropriate), facilitate communication with bid team members. Manage and collaborate closely with the Proposal Manager to drive the development of winning, compelling, and compliant bid responses with timely submission to customer timeframes Actively engage in all gate reviews throughout the deal flow, including Deal Qualification Review, Technical Certification, Deal Review, Contract Review, Win/Loss Reviews and Solution Handover. Ensure timescales are achieved at each step of the bid process, including all internal governance, while taking the initiative in setting realistic deadlines. Continuous Improvement Maintain current knowledge of industry best practices, proposal trends and evolving client demands. Seek feedback from sales teams, clients, and internal stakeholders to improve bid execution quality, effectiveness and win rates. Identify opportunities to streamline and automate the bid execution process. Contribute to the development and enhancement of proposal templates, tools & resources. Qualifications Bachelors Degree in business, project management or a related field. MBA or equivalent is a plus. Accomplished bid leader with demonstrable success managing IT services opportunities in a fast-paced environment with tight deadlines, Experience in managing and tracking multiple time-phased activities. Strong project management and process application skills and knowledge. External project management certification such as PMP from PMI or other project management certification is preferred. Ability to facilitate business activities including workshops to develop compelling messaging and winning solutions that deliver client outcomes. Familiarity with proposal management software and tools. Experience with as-a-Service and Hybrid Cloud Solutions offerings. Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, PowerPoint, Excel), graphic design and/or desktop publishing an advantage. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams. Ability to work as part of a global team which may require engaging across distances, cultures, and time zones in a matrix organizational structure. APMP Practitioner Certification or possession of skill set and experience to acquire certification required. 10+ years of progressive sales focused business experience in the information technology sector. Additional

Software Developer with experience in low-level development (drivers, Linux kernel, Python) to join our R&D Software Development team in Brazil and meet the development needs of both local teams and business units outside of Brazil.
