requirements: You are a game changer inspired by a start-up atmosphere within a Fortune 500 company? Ready to roll your sleeves and help unleash the world’s biggest PC company’s full potential? Someone who by DNA challenges the status quo? Then come and join us as: Solutions & Services Inside Sales - Config & Deploy. We are seeking a Solutions & Services Inside Sales - Config & Deploy to partner with our Account Sales Team and wider Services sales team in driving customer success through the design, configuration, and deployment of PC and Data Center configuration and deployment services. Your will be reporting to our SSG Market Leader of Central Eastern Europe and Central Asia. This role is open in Bratislava, Bucharest and Belgrade - whenever is most suitable for the right candidate. Professional working fluency in either German, French, Spanish, or Italian is required for this role. What You Will do: Conduct customer discovery sessions, sales & technical presentations, demonstrations, and solution workshops. Partner with Account Managers and Sales Representatives to identify customer business and technical requirements, Act as a trusted advisor throughout the sales cycle Support sales opportunities by providing technical expertise and solution recommendations, Position configuration and deployment services for PC, workstation, server, storage solutions, Propose solution architectures, technical proposals, and service scope, Validate solution compatibility, scalability, and alignment with customer requirements, Collaborate with vendors and internal teams to ensure technically accurate and competitive solutions. Key requirements are: Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent work experience. 2+ years of experience in sales, pre-sales, systems engineering, or infrastructure solutions, Knowledge of PC, server, storage technologies, Strong customer-facing communication, presentation, and problem-solving skills, Ability to work effectively in a cross-functional environment with sales, technical, and delivery teams, Fluent English (written and spoken) is required, Fluency in at least one of the following languages is required: German, French, Spanish, or Italian. What We can offer You: Opportunities for career development & growth Performance based rewards Hybrid working model (homeoffice/office) 3 sick days per year Additional vacation days 100% sick leave compensation up to 2 months per year A broad selection of soft / hard skills trainings and individual mentoring Employer contribution to the Third Pillar Pension System Life & life events insurance, fully covered by company *For Slovakia only: The anticipated initial gross base monthly salary range for this position is 2 654 - 3 540 euros, depending on experience. Commission: 30% of total on-target earnings. Become part of Lenovo’s services-led transformation and help us redefine the industry. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Additional

Job Description Summary: We are seeking a high-potential, strategic Senior Business Manager to partner with U.S. Corporate sales leadership and drive profitable growth across the REL business. This is not a traditional operations role, this leader will act as a force multiplier, bringing insight, structure, and momentum to the business. The ideal candidate is a self-starter, highly proactive, and confident business leader who can challenge the status quo, influence senior stakeholders, and translate strategy into execution. This role reports to the NA REL Business Management Director within the NA Category Organization and works in tight partnership with NA Sales Leadership, Global REL teams, and cross-functional organizations. Key Responsibilities: Strategic Business Leadership Serve as a trusted advisor to segment leadership, owning the business narrative, identifying gaps, and driving clear actions. Lead annual and quarterly segment strategy , setting targets for revenue, market share, and GP based on market dynamics and competitive insights. Shift the organization from reactive reporting to forward-looking, insight-driven decision making . Performance Management & Growth Acceleration Own end-to-end business performance management , including pipeline health, revenue attainment, and profitability. Assess performance on a quarterly and in-quarter basis , identifying risks and deploying targeted actions to close gaps. Drive campaign planning and execution that integrates product, pricing, services attach, and competitive positioning. 4P & Commercial Excellence Lead a more strategic 4P motion (Product, Price, Promotion, Place) to influence outcomes—not just measure them. Shape product mix, pricing strategy, and attach motions (ADJ, services, solutions) to improve overall business performance. Ensure alignment across Channel, Marketing, Enablement, and Services teams to execute unified plans. Financial Ownership & Business Discipline Own and articulate P&L dynamics , including risks, opportunities, and quarterly commitments at sub-segment and product levels. Manage key business levers such as FGI, inventory health, and margin optimization . Drive disciplined execution while maintaining agility to adjust within the quarter. Deal Strategy & Market Competitiveness Support strategic deal-making by maximizing alliance and funding programs to enhance competitiveness. Partner with sales on large or strategic deals to ensure the best outcome for both customer and business. Customer & Market Insight Maintain a strong pulse on the market through customer engagements, events, and advisory councils . Bring back insights to shape strategy, messaging, and solution positioning. Cross-Functional Leadership Align and mobilize cross-functional teams, including Marketing, Finance, Channel, Enablement, and GSC, around top business priorities. Act as the connective tissue across the organization to remove friction and accelerate execution. Basic Qualifications: Experience & Capability Bachelor’s degree in Business, Economics, Marketing, or related field 5+ years of experience across Sales, Sales Ops, Category, Product Management, or Marketing Leadership Profile High-potential (HiPo) with executive presence and the ability to influence senior stakeholders Operates with a bias for action, proactive, resilient, and accountable Strong business acumen with the ability to connect strategy to execution Comfortable operating in ambiguity and driving clarity Preferred Qualifications: Experience in Global/Corporate accounts preferred Exceptional communication and storytelling skills (executive-ready) Strong analytical mindset with the ability to turn data into actionable insights Proven ability to work cross-functionally and lead without authority Advanced proficiency in Excel and business tools (Qlik, Dynamics preferred) Strong operational rigor paired with strategic thinking We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Additional

We are seeking a DevSecOps Manager to lead the integration of security across our software development and infrastructure lifecycle. This role combines technical leadership, team management, and security strategy to drive "shift-left" security at scale. Key Responsibilities: Lead and mentor a team of DevSecOps engineers, defining roadmaps and OKRs for secure CI/CD and infrastructure automation. Design and enforce security controls embedded in the software development lifecycle (SDLC), including SAST, DAST, SCA, container scanning, and secret detection. Partner with development, security, and operations teams to establish secure cloud architectures and infrastructure as code (IaC) best practices. Drive adoption of security-as-code, policy-as-code, and compliance automation (CIS, SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP where applicable). Establish metrics, SLIs/SLOs for security posture, pipeline health, and vulnerability remediation. Lead incident response and root cause analysis for security events tied to CI/CD or cloud infrastructure. Evaluate and select DevSecOps tooling, balancing security value with developer productivity. Position Requirements Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field 8 years of professional experience in DevOps, DevSecOps, Cloud Engineering, or a related role Hands‑on experience with CI/CD platforms such as GitLab, Jenkins, or Bitbucket Strong experience with containers and orchestration technologies including Docker and Kubernetes Solid understanding of secure SDLC principles, DevSecOps methodologies, and cloud‑native architectures Proficiency in scripting and automation using Python and Bash Experience working in distributed, cross‑functional, and international engineering teams What Lenovo Can Offer You Compensation & Rewards Performance-based salary reviews and annual bonuses Meal tickets, service anniversary awards, and referral bonuses Employee share purchase program Scholarships for employees’ children Health & Well-being Fully covered private medical insurance Annual well-being allowance for sports, training, relaxation, and therapy, and on-site chair massage Life & accident insurance with extra medical coverage Employee Assistance Program Training & Development Technical Ladder & Sales Excellence programs Individual Career Development Plans with mentoring Bookster subscription for continuous learning Time Away 21–28 vacation days depending on tenure Sick days and extra paid leave for public holidays on weekends Additional paid leave for employees with children We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: About the Position The Senior Manager of Profit Management is a critical leadership role responsible for driving profitable growth across the entire REL business. This leader will build and lead a high-performing team of Profit Managers who proactively identify, shape, and execute opportunities to improve revenue, margin, and overall business performance. This role goes beyond deal support, owning a holistic view of profit across pipeline, backlog, pricing, cost structure, and portfolio, and partnering across Sales, Business Management, Finance, Product, and Alliances to unlock incremental value. The ideal candidate brings strong financial and commercial acumen, deep analytical capability, and executive presence to influence senior stakeholders and drive disciplined, insight-led decisions at scale. Key Responsibilities: Lead & Build a High-Impact Profit Management Function Recruit, develop, and lead a team of Profit Managers focused on end-to-end profit optimization Establish a culture of proactive opportunity identification across the business—not just reactive deal support Position the team as strategic partners to Sales and BMs , driving both growth and profitability Drive Holistic Profit Strategy Across REL Own and lead profitability strategies across segments, verticals, and product categories Identify and close gaps across revenue, margin, AUR, cost, and mix Develop and requirements: 岗位职责 1. 整体解决方案架构设计：主导车载娱乐系统的整体解决方案架构，包括操作系统（如 Android Automotive, QNX, Linux ）、应用框架、多媒体引擎、语音交互、 OTA 更新机制等。 2. 跨平台协同：协调硬件、软件、 UI/UX 、云服务与第三方生态（如手机互联、流媒体服务、语音助手）的集成，确保端到端体验的无缝性。 3. 需求定义与产品路线图：与产品管理、市场及客户团队协作，定义系统功能需求，制定中长期技术路线图。 4. 业务支撑：支撑商务获取新业务，提供解决方案，从产品线角度维护客户研发部门关系 ; 支撑 FO/ 软件 / 测试进行座舱项目交付。 5. 技术选型与供应商管理：评估并选择关键软硬件组件（如 SoC 、显示屏、音频系统、连接模块），管理第三方供应商与合作伙伴的技术对接。 6. 合规与安全标准：确保系统符合 automotive functional safety （如 ISO 26262 ）、信息安全（ ISO/SAE 21434 ）及数据隐私法规（如 GDPR ）要求。 7. 量产支持与问题解决：在项目量产阶段提供技术决策支持，快速响应并解决集成、测试与售后反馈中的系统级问题。 8. 创新与前瞻技术探索：跟踪行业趋势（ Stereo HUD 融合、舱驾一体、生成式 AI 应用等），推动新技术在娱乐系统中的落地。 岗位要求 教育背景：计算机科学、电子工程、自动化或相关领域硕士及以上学历。 工作经验： 15 年以上汽车电子或消费电子领域经验，有座舱，中央计算一体化经验优先考虑。 系统思维：具备强大的系统级思维，能平衡性能、成本、功耗与开发周期。 跨团队协作能力：出色的沟通与领导力，能有效协调软件、硬件、测试、产品与外部合作伙伴。 行业知识：熟悉汽车开发流程（如 ASPICE ）、功能安全与车规级认证流程。 语言能力：流利的英语沟通能力，具备跨文化协作经验者优先。 Additional

requirements: Location: Whitsett, United States Minimum Education Required: Degree or equivalent business experience Experience: 1-3 years Position Description Order Execution Team is responsible for the E2E operation from the MO creation until the commit dates (RSSD/PSSD/RPSSD) for all ISG products shipped from the factory. We manage the execution and operative relationship between manufacturing and our internal customers. Manufacturing Order Management. Our key KPI is to ensure every single order ships according to the SLA (RSSD/PSSD/RPSSD). Owners to drive any Supply or Material Allocation. Prioritize critical orders to meet customer requirements and expectations, follow past due, coming due and tails. Interlock with Order Fulfillment Team on critical orders and open issues. CTB/ATB Analysis and Reporting. Capacity Requirements. Deal with special customer requirements. Control build ahead. Review daily backlog to get in front of potential issues affecting customers. Control and applied Offspecs/Deviations from the factory. Finish Goods Optimization. Physical Inventory Rebalance. Position Requirements Advanced Excel skills. SAP S4, IPS and LeMES. English proficiency. Ability to work under pressure and deadlines. Customer Service skills. Strong ownership, leadership and sense of urgency. Positive attitude. Embrace challenge, find complex and challenging situations as opportunities to learn. Innovative thinking. Proactive and organized. Project Management skills. Activities to learn in Order Execution Team Learn about ISG portfolio (Think Systems-Options-Storage-Networking). Overview on supply chain process. Analytical Thinking and Reasoning. KPIs and BMS. Enhance leadership and communication skills. Networking with different local and WW Teams. Executive presentations to WW Teams. Innovation driving better decision making. Learn about WW Projects. Visa Sponsorship: This position is not eligible for visa sponsorship, including Optional Practical Training (OPT) or Curricular Practical Training (CPT). All applicants must be currently authorized to work in the United States for any employer. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. The Server Product Manager owns the definition, delivery, and lifecycle performance of complex server products or product line elements. The role is accountable for making high‑quality product decisions, ensuring strong cross-functional execution, and maintaining product competitiveness throughout the lifecycle. This role operates as the primary integrator across engineering, operations, sales, and marketing, translating requirements into clear direction, aligning stakeholders, and driving execution with consistency and predictability. The Product Manager applies deep domain expertise to improve decision outcomes, product quality, and business performance within their scope. You will be expected to own one or more server products as well as supporting sustaining activities on existing products. Key Responsibilities Product Definition and Decision Ownership Define product requirements, configurations, and positioning within assigned scope Develop clear, well-founded recommendations with explicit trade-offs across cost, performance, and timing Drive alignment on product decisions across stakeholders and ensure consistent understanding and execution Anticipate dependencies and downstream impacts to minimise rework and late-stage changes Lifecycle Management and Execution Own the product lifecycle from concept through launch, in-market management, and transition Ensure product readiness across all dimensions, including supply, quality, pricing, and sales enablement Maintain predictable execution cadence, proactively addressing risks and resolving issues Support lifecycle transitions, replacements, and substitutions while ensuring continuity for customers and sales Cross-Functional Leadership Lead coordination across engineering, supply chain, operations, sales, and marketing teams Align priorities, timelines, and deliverables across multiple stakeholders and regions Resolve conflicts and remove execution barriers to maintain progress and delivery quality Establish clear accountability and ownership across all aspects of product execution Product Competitiveness and Performance Ensure products meet competitive benchmarks across performance, cost, feature set, and customer value Monitor product performance in market and drive improvements where required Support pricing, positioning, and configuration decisions in collaboration with commercial teams Identify opportunities to improve product offering or address competitive gaps Data, Tools, and Operational Discipline Maintain accuracy and consistency of product data, configuration tools, and supporting collateral Ensure stakeholders have access to reliable, up-to-date information for decision-making and execution Establish and uphold standards that improve data quality and reduce operational errors Resolve inconsistencies across teams, regions, or systems to maintain a single source of truth Customer and Market Engagement Develop strong understanding of customer requirements and usage scenarios across target segments Incorporate customer and partner feedback into product definition and ongoing improvements Engage with key stakeholders to validate product direction and support business development activities Expertise and Continuous Improvement Act as a recognised subject-matter expert within assigned product scope Track relevant industry trends, technology developments, and partner roadmaps Apply expertise to improve product decisions, resolve complex issues, and guide stakeholders Share knowledge and contribute to the development of team capability and best practices Qualifications and Experience Significant experience in server, infrastructure, or related product management roles (~12+ years) Proven track record of delivering complex products or product lines Strong understanding of system-level design considerations and cost/performance trade-offs Experience working across global, cross-functional organisations Demonstrated ability to manage ambiguity and drive decisions to closure Technical & AI Fluency Comfortable working closely with engineering and technical teams without needing to specialise in implementation Curious and open to continuous learning across technologies, tools, and evolving product domains Interest in leveraging AI-assisted tools to improve effectiveness, insight, and decision quality Awareness of AI-related considerations (e.g. security, data handling, product design implications) is advantageous Leadership and Impact Influences outcomes across functions through expertise, clarity of thinking, and delivery ownership Drives alignment and accountability in complex, matrixed environments Ensures decisions are understood, executed consistently, and deliver intended business outcomes Contributes to a high-performing, collaborative, and effective team environment Additional

requirements: Role Overview Lenovo is seeking a high-impact Senior Solutions & Services Executive (Saudi National) to lead growth in the sports industry across Saudi Arabia. This role is responsible for driving new business (hunter profile) and expanding Lenovo’s footprint across Sports Ministries, Federations, Clubs, Leagues, Esports organizations, and Sports & Entertainment entities. The successful candidate will position Lenovo as a strategic technology partner, leveraging Hybrid Cloud, AI, Edge, and TruScale (as-a-service) offerings to deliver measurable outcomes aligned to the digital transformation agendas of sports organizations. Key Responsibilities Identify, develop, and close net-new opportunities within: sports ministries & government authorities, national & regional sports federations, professional clubs & leagues, esports organizations & gaming ecosystems, sports & entertainment venues and operators, build a strong pipeline of multi-million-dollar opportunities focused on solutions and services (Opex/consumption-based models) Drive strategic account penetration and whitespace expansion across the sports ecosystem Own OneLenovo engagement strategy for the sports vertical in KSA Activate and align channel partners, ISVs, and ecosystem players to accelerate deal velocity Represent Lenovo at key industry platforms (e.g., LEAP, sports summits, and sports events) Lead value-based, consultative sales engagements with C-level stakeholders (CIO, CTO, CFO, Digital Heads) Position Lenovo’s portfolio including: Hybrid Cloud & Software Defined Infrastructure, AI / GPU workloads (analytics, fan engagement, performance optimization), Smart venues, IoT, and edge computing, TruScale consumption-based services Translate customer business needs into outcome-driven solutions (fan experience, operational efficiency, revenue growth, sustainability) Own the full sales cycle: Opportunity identification → qualification → solutioning → proposal → negotiation → closure Develop financial models and business cases (TCO, ROI, IRR, Opex vs Capex, IFRS considerations) Coordinate with legal, delivery, and services teams to structure contracts, SLAs, and commercials Ensure accurate forecasting, pipeline visibility, and CRM discipline Establish trusted advisor status with executive stakeholders across the sports ecosystem, driving long-term partnerships and account growth strategies. requirements: Role Summary We are looking for an AI/ML Engineer with strong Python skills and a passion for building production-ready AI systems. In this role, you will contribute to developing and deploying LLM-based applications, including multi-agent systems and RAG pipelines, while ensuring scalability, reliability, and cost efficiency. Key Responsibilities Model Integration: Assist in deploying and maintaining machine learning models into production environments using Python and cloud services. Agentic Frameworks : Hands-on experience with LangGraph, CrewAI, or AutoGen to build multi-agent systems that can reason, plan, and execute multi-step tasks. RAG : Understanding of advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques, including hybrid search, reranking, and semantic chunking using vector databases like Pinecone, Weaviate, or Chroma. Model Context Protocol (MCP) : Familiarity with implementing MCP servers to help LLMs interact securely with external tools and data sources. Data Pipeline Support: Help clean, preprocess, and augment datasets to improve model training and evaluation. Prompt Engineering: Design, test, and iterate on system prompts to ensure high-quality and safe AI outputs. Token Optimization: Ability to manage context window limits and optimize token usage to balance model performance with operational costs. MLOps Basics: Experience with CI/CD pipelines tailored for AI, including model versioning and automated testing of prompts within the development lifecycle. Collaboration: Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and technical documentation to ensure code quality and knowledge sharing. Continuous Learning: Stay up-to-date with the latest AI research, libraries, and tools to suggest improvements to our tech stack. Qualifications: Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field (or equivalent practical experience). Programming: Proficiency in Python AI Foundations: Basic understanding of machine learning concepts (Supervised vs. Unsupervised learning) Web Basics: Familiarity with RESTful APIs and how to integrate them into a backend. Version Control: Solid grasp of Git and collaborative workflows. Problem Solving: A "hacker" mindset—willing to experiment, fail fast, and iterate on complex problems. Experience : 5+ years of relevant experience Additional

requirements: Staff Hardware Engineer What you'll do: The position is for a Hardware Development Engineer in the Lenovo Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG), based in Bangalore, Karnataka. This is an exciting role in the ThinkSystem Server Development organization that has a strong focus to be the #1 trusted IT Partner in the Datacenter market. The hardware development engineer will be an integral member of a team responsible for developing innovative and complex server designs to meet customer and business needs. These organic designs provide exposure to the latest technologies from Lenovo and its development partners to meet market demands. The role also entails solving unique client challenges through the custom development of solutions. Required skills: · Bachelor’s Degree in Electronics/Computer Engineering. · experience in x86 architecture and hardware design. Server design experience is strongly preferred. · Knowledge and design experience of DDR, PCIe, USB, Ethernet, SPI, I2C along with High-speed PCB design and signal integrity will be an essential requirement. · Experience in EDA schematic design tools for PCB schematic creation, supporting physical/Layout design activity, hardware bring-up and validation will be required · Strong problem-solving skills with an ability to triage and resolve complex hardware issues, working seamlessly with other engineers on problem investigation will be essential. · Strong written and verbal communication skills for a variety of tasks, potentially including customer engagements, architecture design/feedback, and executive updates. · Demonstrated ability to work effectively in both a team environment and self-directed; passionate about learning new technologies and skills. Preferred skills: · Master’s Degree · Previous experience in High-speed board design, Signal Integrity, FPGA code development and validation, DC Power circuit design, and/or PCIe bus design, simulation, and validation. · Proficiency in Linux/Windows Operating systems. Experience with OS virtualization. · Strong proficiency in shell scripting (BASH/Perl/Python and Windows Power Shell) · Demonstrated successful hardware design execution on a project with engineering team members located in multiple geographies. · Business acumen to engage with various functional teams required to take projects from concept to production. Additional

requirements: 职责： 1. 产品规划与策略 平板产品项目中第一负责人/专家，对接客户需求及真实市场用户反馈，将用户需求转化为产品需求，包括产品需求迭代排期计划、产品需求优先级，产品竞品功能实时跟进，同时针对特殊情况（如认证或合规要求）对版本主线与分支投入产品功能进行管理。 主导核心功能模块（如系统UI/Launcher、多任务管理、文件管理、应用分身、多屏协同、隐私权限、应用生态【国内及海外】、OTA升级等）的产品定义与需求分析，输出高质量产品需求文档（PRD/SRS/FL），明确功能逻辑、交互流程、性能指标及验收标准。 2. 端到端协同与交付 主导需求评审会，与架构、设计、研发、测试团队对齐，确保需求理解一致，需求变更受控 作为产品接口人，紧密协同UX/UI设计、软件开发、系统集成、测试及供应商团队，推动产品方案落地 参与关键里程碑评审（如技术方案评审、测试用例评审、版本验收），确保产品交付质量。输出《产品状态周报》，定期同步进度、风险及决策需求 3.方案评审与问题闭环 主导推进Solution准备，参与缺陷根因分析（RCA），推动产品侧问题的优化闭环 主导版本验收测试（UAT），确保交付功能满足需求定义，客户验收通过 建立产品度量体系，跟踪关键指标（如功能使用率、用户满意度、缺陷密度），驱动持续改进 4. 客户与市场洞察 对接客户（OEM）需求，准确理解并转化为产品功能，管理客户期望 持续跟踪行业动态与竞品发展，每季度输出1份高质量竞品分析报告，推动≥2个产品优化点落地 任职要求： 1. 计算机、工业设计、电子通信、自动化等相关专业，本科及以上学历 ，本科及以上学历，10年 以上平板、手机或消费电子产品经理经验 。 2. 主导过 2个以上完整平板/手机项目的产品定义与交付 ，熟悉Android平板开发流程，具备从0到1的产品规划经验， 必须具备海外项目经验 （如欧美、东南亚等市场） 3. 熟练使用产品设计工具（Figma/Sketch/Axure）及项目管理工具（Jira/Confluence）。 4. 核心素质 ：优秀的逻辑思维能力与结构化表达能力，能够清晰定义复杂产品逻辑；强大的推动力与跨团队协同能力，能够在高压环境下推动项目前进；严谨的问题闭环意识，对交付质量有极致追求 加分项： 1. 具备信息安全，车载法规（国内+海外）相关知识 2.熟悉Google GMS认证流程及海外市场合规要求（如GDPR、CE、FCC等）。 3.具备流利的英语口语交流能力，能作为工作语言与海外客户沟通 Additional

requirements: What you'll do: This position is for a Technical Project Manager of server development projects within Lenovo’s Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG), based in Bangalore, Karnataka. This is an exciting role in a growing server development organization that is focused on being the #1 trusted IT Partner in the datacenter infrastructure market. The customer is always a top priority for this team and the position offers opportunities to grow and solv e unique client challenges. The candidate will collaborate with worldwide engineering teams to develop customized server platforms for use in cloud datacenter environments. The candidate will collaborate closely with internal functional teams as well as with customers to develop detailed project plans, including scope definition, schedule, budgets, and statements-of-work. The candidate will drive project execution and report status to both internal and external project stakeholders. This position will support development of multiple server platforms in parallel. The candidate should have a broad understanding of system-level server technologies, as well as experience managing technology-based product development projects. Required skills : · Bachelor’s Degree · Collaborate with global engineering teams across: Hardware / Electrical / Mechanical Firmware / BIOS / BMC Validation / Quality Risk, Issue & Change Management Identify, track, and mitigate program risks and issues Drive structured problem-solving and escalation management Ensure proactive change control and impact assessment · Data-Driven Program Management (Enhanced) o Define and track program KPIs, metrics, and dashboards o Leverage tools such as: o Excel, Power BI, dashboards o Use data to: o Drive decision-making and forecasting o Improve execution visibility and predictability o Identify risks early · AI & Automation Enablement (Enhanced) o Drive adoption of AI and automation in TPM workflows o Identify opportunities for: o Automated reporting o Predictive risk analytics o Workflow optimization o Promote a data-first and AI-enabled execution culture · 7+ years of experience leading projects technology-based product development projects, preferably related to server or computer product development. · Ability to define a project scope and complete a detailed project sizing of resources and materials/NRE/capital investment. · Ability to understand complex technical problems. · Strong written and verbal communication skills for a variety of tasks, including customer engagements, engineering task management, and executive updates. · Demonstrated ability to work effectively in both a team environment and self-directed; passionate about learning new technologies and skills. Preferred skills: · PMP Certified · Previous experience with datacenter infrastructure. · Experience with AMD server architecture and product development. · Experience with Intel x86 server architecture and product development. · Understanding of BMC and BIOS firmware. Additional

Position Overview: At the center of Lenovo’s most significant technology strategy initiatives within the CTO Office, the Technology Strategy team bridges the gap between emerging technologies and business strategy. We are seeking a strategic thinker who is passionate about technology, thrives in a fast-paced and intellectually curious environment, and enjoys working across a broad range of research and engineering disciplines. As a key member of the Technology Strategy team, you will help shape Lenovo’s long-term innovation agenda by supporting strategic planning, executive decision-making, and organizational alignment across the CTO organization. Working closely with leadership and research teams, you will contribute to defining future technology investments and research priorities that drive Lenovo’s competitive advantage. Key Responsibilities: Strategic Planning & Executive Communications Develop clear, forward-looking strategic deliverables, including technology and market trend analyses, technology outlooks, strategic recommendations, and executive presentations. Translate complex technical and business insights into concise, actionable content for senior leaders. Ensure strategy materials are data-driven, decision-ready, and aligned with CTO organization priorities. Technology Foresight & Long-Term Research Strategy Help define Lenovo’s 2–5 year technology and research focus areas, including domains such as AI models and agents, smart devices, next-generation computing platforms, component innovation, Agent Frameworks, and Agentic Operating Systems. Conduct external technology and market analysis while assessing internal capabilities and competitive positioning. Synthesize diverse inputs into prioritized recommendations that inform research roadmaps, investment decisions, and business group alignment. Cross-Functional Alignment & Governance Partner with R&D, engineering, product, and research teams to align strategic priorities, technical requirements, and execution plans. Support governance processes and executive forums, including annual planning activities, technology brainstorming sessions, and technology committee meetings. Drive clarity around decisions, ownership, action items, and follow-through across stakeholder groups. Portfolio Management & Execution Visibility Monitor progress, dependencies, risks, and key milestones for strategic technology initiatives, including flagship AI programs and emerging technology investments. Identify and escalate issues proactively while facilitating cross-functional resolution. Maintain leadership reporting, OKR alignment, and portfolio visibility to support informed decision-making and execution excellence. Required Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, Technology Management, or a related field. Advanced degree preferred. Experience in management consulting, corporate strategy, technology strategy, product strategy, or a related strategic planning function. Demonstrated knowledge of emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence, smart devices, semiconductor/chipset technologies, and hardware system innovation. Proven ability to evaluate complex technology landscapes and develop strategic recommendations for senior leadership. Strong project and program management skills, with the ability to coordinate multiple workstreams and stakeholders. Preferred Qualifications: Experience working across a broad range of technology domains and rapidly learning new technical concepts. Exceptional analytical and critical-thinking skills, with the ability to assess opportunities, risks, and tradeoffs. Strong executive communication and presentation skills, including experience developing materials for senior leadership audiences. Excellent collaboration and influence skills, with a demonstrated ability to work effectively across technical and non-technical teams. Strong business acumen combined with technical curiosity and strategic thinking. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. Additional

requirements: 岗位职责： 一、云服务运营管理 · 负责客户Token云服务的账号开通、权限配置、服务启用及生命周期管理 · 配合业务与产品团队，完成服务上线、变更、下线等运营动作 · 管理用户使用过程中的运营问题，如额度、权限、服务状态等 二、计费与账单管理 · 负责Token服务的计费数据处理、账单生成与账单准确性校验 · 跟进客户账单确认、差异处理与回款流程 · 维护计费规则（Token计量、套餐/按量/包量逻辑等）的落地执行 三、价格与产品运营支持 · 协助制定与维护Token服务价格体系（如单价、套餐包、折扣策略） · 支持产品进行价格管理 · 参与产品迭代过程中的运营规则设计（计费方式、套餐设计等） 四、对账与业财协同 · 负责客户、供应商及内部部门之间的对账与结算工作 · 配合财务完成发票处理、收入确认、成本分摊等工作 · 跟进合同审批、订单处理及相关运营流程 五、数据与运营分析 · 定期输出云服务运营报表（使用量、收入、成本、客户活跃度等） · 建立并维护业务数据台账，支持业务决策 · 识别运营中的异常数据（费用、Token使用等） 六、合规与风险控制 · 确保Token服务在数据合规、计费合规、合同合规方面符合公司与监管要求 · 配合内部审计或外部合规检查 · 建立标准化运营流程与规范 岗位要求： 具备云服务或相关互联网产品运营经验，熟悉账号管理、服务生命周期运营等核心流程。 了解计费结算、账单管理相关逻辑，具备基础的财务对账或数据处理意识，能精准处理计费相关工作。 具备良好的跨部门协同能力，能有效对接业务、产品、财务等团队，推动运营事项落地。 拥有较强的问题解决能力，能快速响应并处理用户使用过程中的各类运营问题，具备异常数据识别与分析能力。 Additional

Are you ready to lead a business, shape strategy, and drive real commercial impact? As the Country Business Group (Data Center Infrastructure Solutions) Leader , you will own P&L and overall business performance in-market. You will define and drive the country strategy for data center infrastructure solutions, aligning to priority growth areas such as AI, hybrid cloud, and edge computing. You will continuously assess market dynamics, identify and capture new market opportunities by evolving the portfolio mix and positioning Lenovo’s end-to-end capabilities under the One Lenovo model. You will be at the center of business leadership, connecting Sales, Finance, Supply, and Marketing to ensure strategic priorities translate into clear execution and measurable outcomes. You will lead both the go-to-market strategy and its delivery with focus on sustainable growth, profitability, and market share . This is a highly visible leadership role where your ability to set direction, influence senior stakeholders, and drive disciplined execution will directly shape business success. What are your main responsibilities in this role? Take full ownership of country-level performance , including revenue, margin, pricing strategy, and inventory health Align commercial strategy with sales execution , ensuring plans are realistic and achievable Identify performance gaps and implement actions to improve pricing, product mix, and commercial outcomes Drive execution of the Business Management System (BMS), ensuring strong performance tracking and timely interventions Lead forecasting and demand planning in close partnership with Sales, Finance, and Supply teams Ensure end-to-end visibility across pipeline, orders, backlog, and supply to proactively manage risks and opportunities Act as the key integrator across functions , driving alignment and clarity on priorities and trade-offs Partner with CTO and business leadership to strengthen sales funnel efficiency and improve win rates What are the role requirements? You bring strong commercial acumen with experience managing P&L , revenue, and margin performance 10+ years of experience in data center sales , capability building a solution-led selling Proven ability to operate effectively in a complex, matrix organization Experience engaging with press, partners, and customers at executive level. Confidence in influencing senior stakeholders without direct authority. Analytical skills to use data to drive decision-making and business performance You understand forecasting, demand planning, and sales pipeline management Experience driving continuous improvement and business transformation initiatives What do we offer you? Opportunity to own and shape country-level business performance with real impact Exposure to senior leadership and cross-functional decision-making International, collaborative environment within a global organization Career growth opportunities across regions and business units Competitive compensation package aligned with performance Access to professional development and leadership programs Flexible working environment supporting work-life balance What success looks like in 12 – 18 months Deliver sustained P&L growth for ISG by embedding the One Lenovo operating model, driving disciplined execution across pipeline, pricing, and demand planning. Strengthen end-to-end business performance by aligning sales, supply, and finance to improve conversion, optimise margin, and scale infrastructure growth in-market. If you are motivated by ownership, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and enjoy bringing people together to achieve ambitious goals, this role is for you. Apply now and take the lead in shaping business success in UKI. If you’re excited about the role but don’t meet every requirement, we’d still love to hear from you. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. requirements: Job Responsibilities： 1. Responsible for driving user engagement and business growth of Desktop Agentic Edge AI products, designing and operating scalable user engagement frameworks, indicator systems and ecosystem-oriented growth models, and converting AI technical capabilities into effective user adoption and long-term sustained user usage. 2. Design and build end-to-end user engagement systems and growth models for AI hardware and software integrated products, and implement full-process operation and optimization work. 3. Define and manage core product growth metrics covering activation, retention, task completion rate and feature adoption rate, rely on data analysis to discover product and user operation problems, and promote iterative optimization of products and operations. 4. Take charge of beta testing projects and early adopter user operation and maintenance, systematically collect, sort out and analyze user feedback, and feed back valuable insights to the product end to assist product function iteration and experience improvement. 5. Combine user insight data with product and R&D priority planning to support scenario-based product design, make product functions more adaptable to actual user usage scenarios and core demands. 6. Develop and optimize user onboarding processes, guiding content and product best practice guidelines, eliminate user adoption barriers, and effectively improve product user activity and usage frequency. 7. Build and operate product user communities and ecological engagement systems around plugins, skills, workflows and other product ecological modules, and drive the sustainable growth of product ecology and user scale. Job Requirements： 1. Have in-depth understanding of Internet product user growth and user engagement operation logic, with rich experience in building growth frameworks and indicator systems for software and hardware integrated products or AI products. 2. Possess professional data analysis capabilities, be able to independently sort out core growth indicators, conduct data-driven business analysis, and put forward targeted iterative optimization plans. 3. Have rich experience in beta project operation and early user maintenance, be good at capturing user core demands from user feedback, and efficiently link product and R&D resources to realize demand landing. 4. Have strong user insight and scenario analysis capabilities, can accurately match user demands with product R&D and iteration priorities, and support scenario-based product innovative design. 5. Possess excellent content compilation and process optimization capabilities, able to design user onboarding paths and usage guidance content, and effectively reduce user product use thresholds. 6. Have certain ecological operation and community building capabilities, familiar with the operation logic of product plugins, functional skills, workflow and other ecological modules, able to drive ecological user growth. requirements: We are seeking a motivated Data Analytics Intern to join our Data Analytics & Reporting team. This internship offers hands-on experience in SQL, data analysis, and automation to help drive insightful business decisions. You will assist with developing, optimizing, and automating data reporting processes, supporting our team’s mission to enhance data accessibility and efficiency across departments. What you will do: Design, write, and optimize SQL queries to retrieve, transform, and manipulate data for reporting purposes. Develop automated workflows and scripts to streamline data processing and reporting tasks. Collaborate with team members to identify opportunities for improving data pipeline efficiency and effectiveness. Support the creation of dashboards and reporting tools for real-time analytics using Qlik / Power BI. Troubleshoot data issues , ensure data integrity, and document key processes and workflows. Contribute to team projects aimed at enhancing data quality, governance, and compliance. What we need from you: Willingness to learn and can-do attitude . Currently pursuing a degree in Data Analytics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field at a Slovak University . Availability for up to 20 hours a week . English Language (B2 or higher). For non-EU citizens - valid Residence/Work Permit . What we expect from you: To have strong understanding of SQL , data structures, and database concepts. Proficiency with data visualization and analytics tools (e.g., Qlik, Power BI) is a plus . Familiarity with programming or scripting languages (e.g., Python) is a plus . requirements: Are you passionate about technology, business growth, and product strategy? We are looking for a Product & Business Manager – Workstations to drive the development and growth of Lenovo’s workstation business in Switzerland. In this permanent, full-time role, you will collaborate with sales teams, channel partners, and regional stakeholders to manage the workstation portfolio throughout its lifecycle while identifying new business opportunities in a dynamic and evolving market. Occasional travel within Switzerland and across the EMEA region may be required. Key Responsibilities Manage the workstation product portfolio throughout its full lifecycle, including product introductions, transitions, and end-of-life activities. Define pricing strategies, promotional plans, and portfolio positioning to support business objectives. Monitor sales performance, inventory levels, and profitability metrics, providing regular business analysis and forecasts. Drive initiatives to optimize product mix, margin performance, and overall portfolio contribution. Partner with sales teams to execute go-to-market strategies and align commercial activities with product availability and market opportunities. Build and maintain strong relationships with channel partners, customers, ISVs, and other key stakeholders to expand the workstation business. Identify emerging market trends, including AI-driven workflows and professional computing requirements, and translate insights into growth opportunities. Deliver product presentations, business reviews, and enablement activities to support sales effectiveness and customer engagement. Position Requirements Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience. Minimum 5 years of experience in product management, business management, sales, or a related commercial role within the IT industry. Demonstrated experience managing product portfolios, pricing strategies, forecasting, and business performance metrics. Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret market data, financial results, and competitive insights to support decision-making. Knowledge of workstation products, professional computing solutions, or related technology markets is highly desirable. Experience working with channel sales models, distributors, resellers, or partner ecosystems. Professional proficiency in German and English is required; French language skills are considered an advantage. Excellent communication, presentation, stakeholder management, and relationship-building skills, with the ability to influence cross-functional teams. What Lenovo Can Offer You Employee Share Purchase Plan Employee Assistance Program (health, legal, and financial consultancy support) Pension Plan above legal requirements Meal Allowance Sport Allowance Social Security coverage, including accident and sick leave insurance costs covered by Lenovo, with up to 100% OTE payment for up to one year Public Transport Support Mobile Phone and Swisscom flat rate including up to four data cards Internal E-learning Development Platform available to all employees Specialized Development Training opportunities (based on nomination process) Employee Resource Groups, including LGBT+, Women in Lenovo (WIL), and other communities Opportunity to join or create employee groups focused on inclusivity, well-being, sports, volunteering, charity, and social impact We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class. responsibilities: 和要求: 岗位概述 负责联想企业数字化办公领域端到端的AI应用技术架构设计和技术路线规划，聚焦智能协作、流程自动化、知识管理、文档智能处理等核心办公场景，搭建具备高可扩展性与安全性的 AI 技术体系，打通业务需求并主导生成式AI、大模型、智能体等AI技术在数字化办公场景的创新应用与规模化落地，为企业创造可量化的业务价值。 岗位职责 技术路线规划：深度洞察企业办公业务痛点与行业趋势，制定 AI 技术在数字化办公领域的技术路线图及落地优先级。 架构设计：主导AI 应用架构全流程设计，涵盖数据层、算法层、服务层与应用层，平衡功能性、性能、安全性与成本，确保架构兼容联想现有 IT 生态且具备横向扩展能力。 技术落地：主导大模型在企业办公场景的落地架构，包括RAG知识增强、Agent智能体、多智能体架构、多模态交互等技术应用。 跨域协同：协调各业务、DT、IT团队，将业务需求转化为可落地的 AI 解决方案，推动跨部门项目高效执行，确保技术方案与业务价值对齐。 技术治理：建立 AI 应用全生命周期管理体系，制定AI技术标准和规范，保障系统稳定迭代与风险可控。 技术引领：跟踪 AI 前沿技术动态，引入适配办公场景的创新技术与方案，主导技术预研与原型验证，提升团队技术竞争力。

responsibilities: 和要求: Position Description The General Procurement organization is responsible for sourcing, purchasing, and managing spend for all non-production goods or services used internally by Lenovo. Major operating expense categories: RD, marketing, and workforce. The General Procurement team is responsible for leading the following activities: - Working with business unit/budget owner (our internal Lenovo stakeholders), on appropriate spending strategy, including industry best practices, category/market trend analysis, and supplier capabilities; - Appropriately selecting Supplier sources based on driving competitive sourcing activities; - Forming contracts with selected Suppliers to help ensure both deliverables and risk avoidance; - Managing Supplier performance via stakeholder feedback and performance-based metrics; - Ensuring appropriate business controls are in place to protect Lenovo. Job Responsibilities： As a sourcing professional, this candidate will take the lead in multi-category indirect procurement management, responsible for developing and executing category management strategies, optimizing end-to-end sourcing processes for non-production goods and services across various categories. He/she should have extensive experience in indirect procurement covering multiple categories, proactively engage internal stakeholders to provide strategic sourcing solutions, drive high-impact procurement initiatives, and act as the core commercial lead for cross-category spend optimization and supplier ecosystem management. The candidate will be responsible for six (6) primary business metrics: - Manage and optimize Lenovo’s cross-category spend with external suppliers, generating significant Procurement Value-Add through strategic sourcing and category management; - Drive Customer Satisfaction (Serviceability) for internal executives and operations teams via scientific supplier selection, category strategy alignment, and proactive engagement; - Ensure robust Business Controls throughout sourcing, contracting, spending, and supplier management processes; - Develop and promote best practices, lead transformation initiatives to achieve continuous improvement in category procurement efficiency and effectiveness; - Initiate and optimize procure-to-pay processes for non-strategic purchases, enhancing overall procurement operational efficiency; - Formulate and implement category management strategies to optimize category structure, reduce supply chain risks, and improve long-term supply stability.
